It's up to you to decide how to catch the deer; some methods are more efficient than others, so you'll have to find the one that works best for you. Detailed graphics and digitized sound round out the experience for would-be hunters.

title_en: DEJA VU I _ II - THE CASEBOOKS OF ACE HARDING
no_intro_name: Deja Vu I _ II - The Casebooks of Ace Harding (USA)
overview_en:
Take on two thrilling mysteries in one Game Pak!

Life is never boring when you assume the role of Ace Harding, private detective. In Deja Vu I, you will scramble down the dark alleys of Chicago, searching for a cure for you amnesia and a killer who has framed you for a brutal murder. After solving the first case, you'll uncover a few loose strings that gradually unrabel into Deja Vu II. Trapped in the slimy town of Last Vegas, you find yourself dealing with a notorious mob leader who makes you an offer you can't refuse.

-Two detailed graphic adventure games in one Game Boy Color Game Pak!
-Detailed commands for interacting with anyone or anything!
-Return to the scene of the crime, or any of the other 140 locations!
-Sort out the real evidence from the red herrings and over 80 other items!
-Battery-backed save option for up to three save game files!

There are 6 game modes: "Winning Battle", "Free Battle", "Gamers Mode", "Beginner Guide", "Communication Battle", and "Item Mode". You can shop at Gamers with the points that won the mahjong game. Depending on the item you bought, the attribute value of the character will change, and mahjong will be advantageous. The voice is uttered by four people (Di Gi Charat, Buchiko, Usada, Panda), so you can enjoy it with your favorite character's voice.

The people of Puzzle Island love to play puzzle games. Their favorite is Denki Blocks! A game of skill that is played by sliding blocks around a board, joining colored blocks together to build shapes and solve puzzles.

A train driving simulation game that stops the train at the station's stop position on Diamond Street. Stamp rally is adopted for all routes and sections as a new game system. Depending on the accuracy of the stop position, the stamp of the stop station will appear for each level. Since the stamps are stored in the backup cartridge and can be viewed freely, you can use it as a guide for achieving the station capture, and you can compete with your friends for the number of stamps you have collected. The lines that appear are the Sanin line, Keihin Tohoku line, Tokaido line, and Yamanote line, and if you collect stamps for all lines, extra lines will appear.

The second train driving game is now available at GBC. There are five driving routes: the Hokuhoku North Line, the Osaka Loop Line, the Kagoshima Main Line, and the Akita Shinkansen where you can enjoy high-speed driving. There is also a "fixed time system" that passes through the station at a fixed time. Adopted "Railway picture book mode" that collects railway photos by rank according to driving evaluation. The characteristics of each train are commented on the photos, and you can create a digital photo book by collecting the photos. These photos were taken by professional photographer Yosuke Shiozuka, and there are hundreds of them. It's compatible with game boy printers, so you can print out the photos you collect and exchange them with your friends. A full-scale train driving game that railroad fans will appreciate.

Robots are running amok in Dexter's lab! Based on the popular cartoon series, DEXTER'S LABORATORY: Robot Rampage for the Game Boy Color puts you in the little boots of the Dexter as he tries to reclaim his lab from Mandark's invading mechanical mayhem. You'll have to ride elevators, dive down shafts, hide in shadows, and occasionally blast the robotic intruders as you hunt down your evil nemesis. There are three different outfits you can wear to make infiltrating the lab easier: wear your standard lab-coat or one of two special robo-suits, depending on what the situation calls for. You can also use Dexter's high-tech weapons to dispatch the enemy through level after level of fast and furious action.

no_intro_name: Dino Breeder 3 - Gaia Fukkatsu (Japan) (SGB Enhanced) (GB Compatible)
overview_en: Incubate dinosaurs from eggs and let them travel on an adventure. Let's clear the waiting enemies and numerous events and create a new species by "fusion" while nurturing by feeding and sometimes treating. The number of scenarios will increase significantly, and the story will branch out. There are two types of dinosaurs that players can train, Stycola Saurus and Sordes, and six new types. The dinosaur grows in four stages. It is also possible to play against each other using a communication cable, and if you lose the game, the new species will become the opponent's thing.

Dr. Matsunaga continues to study dinosaur genes (Dinogenome). One day when the research was nearing completion, he suddenly disappeared, leaving a sample. There, Dr. Matsunaga's grandson, Dr. Matsunaga appeared, believed in the survival of the doctor, got on the time machine left by his grandfather, time slipped into the past, and set out on an adventure! The Dinoboo leader of the training series powers up with a fulfilling story and action! Not only the number of dinosaurs, but also the visual aspect, "super-futuristic DNA coalescence" in fusion, and the towering of many new systems, all of which are far beyond the previous work! The story has two screens, an action side and a bleeding side, and you will get an anesthetic bullet hitting Dino who will accompany your trip on the action side. Once you get Dino, take care of the dinosaurs and go on an adventure together. Defeat the enemies you encounter, overcome the events, obtain the items, and "DNA coalesce" with the fusion you arrived at to produce new species and complete the picture book. You can exchange new kinds of dinosaurs with your friends by installing a communication system.
Dinosaur'us is a Role-Playing game, developed by RFX Interactive and published by Electronic Arts, which was released in Europe in 2001.
Diva Starz: Mall Mania is an Action game, developed by Digital Illusions and published by VU Games, which was released in 2001.

Are you looking to adopt a pet but lack the time or space to take care of a real one? Then you may find DOGZ to be of interest. Part of the small but popular virtual pet genre, DOGZ lets you adopt a dog from one of three breeds: Chihuahua, Scottie, or mutt. You can play with the pet first to decide if it's right for you. Once you've adopted the little gal or fella, it's up to you to take care of it: feed it, groom it, and play with it regularly if you want it to grow up to be a well-adjusted adult. If you mistreat your dog, though, your little pet will take off! Eventually, new breeds of dogs and new special toys will become available for you, depending on how well you do. You can even trade toys and breeds of dogs with your friends via the infrared link.

This is the Kingdom of Dokapon (Land), the country that gave birth to many small legends. One day, the 18th King of the Kingdom of Dokapon was troubled by an incident and put up a job advertisement all over the country. "We are looking for brave human resources! With a nap for three meals, Paradise will be waiting for you! For more information, please visit Dokopon Castle ~" An adventurer's egg came to the Kingdom of Dokapon with such a job advertisement. .. "It's not such a dangerous job because it's that king," he chose for his first job as an adventurer. However, it was a dangerous job with 151 monsters waiting for you, from the crazy guy to the mukatsuku guy! .. Combat is a "rock-paper-scissors" system, so it's important to outwit the enemy. Play hot battles with your friends and steal their equipment.

Keeping Donald content is about as easy as herding cats, but everyone's favorite fusspot really goes off the deep
end when malodorous magician Merlock duck-naps Daisy. To add insult to injury, Donald's uppity cousin, Gladstone
Gander, vows to rescue Daisy. Thus begins Donald's great race to reach Daisy first and foil Merlock's nefarious
plans.

The player has four lives that can increase by finding special items. Each life gives Donald two opportunities to be touched by the enemy, the first time is touched, he becomes angry and throws berserk to the enemies, the second time, he loses a life. Donald can also unlock new outfits, which alter cutscenes and idle animations (such as Donald taking photos of the place if he is dressed like a tourist).

The best-selling Super NES game of all time is back! Remember blasting through levels in barrels and taking wild mine cart rides? All the jammin' jungle hi-jinks are back, along with DK's animal friends Rambi the Rhino, Squawks the Parrot, Enguarde the Swordfish and more! In addition to all the original levels, you get the chest-pounding fun of new bonus levels and 2-player games.

Donkey Kong Country is a 2000 Game Boy Color video game developed by Rare and released by Nintendo of America in the USA on November 20, 2000.

The best-selling Super NES game of all time is back! Remember blasting through levels in barrels and taking wild mine cart rides? All the jammin' jungle hi-jinks are back, along with DK's animal friends Rambi the Rhino, Squawks the Parrot, Enguarde the Swordfish, and more! In addition to all the original levels, you get the chest-pounding fun of new bonus levels and 2-player games.

title_en: DONKEY KONG GB - DINKY KONG _ DIXIE KONG
no_intro_name: Donkey Kong GB - Dinky Kong _ Dixie Kong (Japan)
overview_en:
Fame-and-fortune seekers have flooded Donkey Kong Country in search of the fabled Lost World. You command Dixie Kong and Kiddy Kong through 36 Kong-sized levels of action and adventure. Use your animal friends - Squitter the spider, Squawks the parrot, Ellie the elephant, Enguarde the swordfish and Parry the parallel bird - to help you prove your adventuring skills and find the Lost World before someone else does!

In this updated version of Donkey Kong Land III, enjoy the classic adventure now in full color exclusively released in Japan.

"Navigation (navigation action game)" that guides five familiar friends to the goal while making a good path. When the game starts, the character once starts walking. The lamp demon is made of smoke, so it is full of enemy characters, clouds, and smoke that block the way. The player uses the gimmicks well to defeat the enemy and guide the character. You must finish the character within the time limit while getting items such as Dorayaki so as not to touch the thunder and enemy characters. There are 60 stages including the back mountain of the school. In addition, a post stage, a hidden stage, and a battle play original stage are available.

The previous work used secret tools to win the race, but this time we will race to collect secret tools. Moreover, secret tools cannot be collected just by winning the race. The total number of secret tools is 132. There are three modes: "Scenario mode" where you race to regain secret tools from the king of karts, "VS mode" where you can play 2P with a communication cable, and "Time attack" where you compete for 3 laps with 1P. There are courses with different designs in one world, and there are 5 worlds in that world. Flat ground course, underwater course, cloud course, ice course, etc. are available.

title_en: DORAEMON - KIMI TO PET NO MONOGATARI
no_intro_name: Doraemon - Kimi to Pet no Monogatari (Japan) (GB Compatible)
overview_en: An RPG where players can adventure with Doraemon. The theme this time is friendship between players and pets! Depart with Doraemon and others on a pet hunting trip that I loved. The main character can be selected from two boys and two girls, and you can enjoy different adventures by changing the character. You can enjoy battle with "friendship attack", "brave point", and "secret tool" techniques. Equipped with a "consultation system" when you don't know what to do next during the game. It is also possible to collect characters and secret tools with trading cards. Of course, you can also exchange with friends using a communication cable.

title_en: DORAEMON MEMORIES - NOBITA NO OMOIDE DAIBOUKEN
no_intro_name: Doraemon Memories - Nobita no Omoide Daibouken (Japan) (GB Compatible)

overview_en: Select the type of quiz such as "up-down quiz", "time try", and "panel attack", and compete for benefits depending on the correctness of the problem. In "Communication Battle Mode", you can select your favorite character from familiar characters such as Doraemon, Nobita, Gian, and Shizuka-chan, and in "Challenge Mode", you can play against two friends. The quiz questions are based on learning questions from the first to sixth grades of elementary school, and about 4,500 questions are prepared, including sports and trivia.

"Doraemon learning software" that allows you to study while playing. Contains more than 5,000 learning quizzes that correspond to the new course of study from 2002. The range of questions is the same as the timetable for music, physical education, life sciences and elementary school students, including Kokusaisha. Furthermore, in the "genre" genre, questions about computers, English, and welfare are also given. There are four game modes: "Up Down Quiz", "Bingo Quiz", "Panel Attack Quiz", and "Time Trial". There are three difficulty levels: low, middle and upper grades. It is also possible to take advantage of the quiz by using secret tools.

title_en: DORAEMON NO STUDY BOY - GAKUSHUU KANJI GAME
no_intro_name: Doraemon no Study Boy - Gakushuu Kanji Game (Japan)
overview_en: The third learning support material for Doraemon. Learning software that covers all 1006 learning kanji learned in the 6th year of elementary school. Since it is set so that students can study by designating a grade, it can be effectively used for reviewing not only the grade but also those before that. Includes a "question mode" with random questions that you won't get tired of, and a "game mode" that allows you to check what you have learned in a fun way. You can play against your friends in "Game Mode". You can search by reading, number of strokes, radicals, etc., and it also has a dictionary function that shows the stroke order, on-yomi, and kun-yomi. Let's enjoy mastering kanji in the game!

title_en: DORAEMON NO STUDY BOY - KANJI YOMIKAKI MASTER
no_intro_name: Doraemon no Study Boy - Kanji Yomikaki Master (Japan)
overview_en: Kanji problem software that corresponds to the new course of study notified by the Ministry of Education, Culture, Sports, Science and Technology from 2002. You can set several levels from basic to advanced according to the level of kanji. Equipped with a dictionary function, it contains kanji learned in the first and second grades of elementary school.

title_en: DORAEMON NO STUDY BOY - KUKU GAME
no_intro_name: Doraemon no Study Boy - Kuku Game (Japan)
overview_en: The second learning support material for Doraemon. A fun and fun learning software to help you learn and use multiplication tables perfectly. Includes a "problem mode" for mastering multiplication tables, a "practice mode" for learning while listening to multiplication tables, a "game mode" for checking multiplication tables in a fun way, and a "game mode" for checking multiplication tables in a fun way. You can play against your friends in "Game Mode". You can also enjoy measuring the progress of multiplication tables using the "clock". If you get lost in the middle of a problem, you can press the select button to see the hint box. Let's have fun mastering multiplication tables in the game!

This hack transforms Dr. Mario Game Boy game into a Game Boy Color game.

Enjoy the Game Boy classic now in full color with a very cool new feature: character selection!

That’s it! Dr. Luigi, Dr. Daisy and Dr. Wario join the virus battle! Choose your favorite doctor to play as, each one with their own sprite, palettes.

It also has a couple of slight QoL tweaks to the original game code.

title_en: DR. RIN NI KIITEMITE! - KOI NO RIN FUUSUI
no_intro_name: Dr. Rin ni Kiitemite! - Koi no Rin Fuusui (Japan)

overview_en: Dracula: Crazy Vampire is an Action game, developed by Planet Interactive and published by DreamCatcher Interactive, which was released in 2001.
publisher:
DreamCatcher Interactive NA
Cryo Interactive EU

title_en: DRAGON BALL Z - DENSETSU NO CHOU SENSHI-TACHI
no_intro_name: Dragon Ball Z - Densetsu no Chou Senshi-tachi (Japan)

title_en: DRAGON BALL Z - LEGENDARY SUPER WARRIORS
no_intro_name: Dragon Ball Z - Legendary Super Warriors (USA)
overview_en: Dragon Ball Z: Legendary Super Warriors is a mixture of a card game and a turn-based fighting game for the Game Boy Color. The game is played with original in-game cards for attacks, techniques and support items and initially has only two modes trade and story. Legendary Super Warriors’ story spans from the Saiyan saga to the end of the Buu Saga. Once beaten, a battle mode is unlocked, allowing players to square off with random enemies. Once the game is beaten, any character is usable in any battle, such as Frieza vs. Cell.

title_en: DRAGON BALL Z - LES GUERRIERS LEGENDAIRES
no_intro_name: Dragon Ball Z - Les Guerriers Legendaires (France)

overview_en: Addictive breakout-style action meets fast and furious arcade fun. With 100 levels, challenging end bosses and multiple power-ups, Dragon Dance is the game you can't put down! Head-to-head combat with boss enemies every 10th level. Random events like earthquakes shake up the gameplay. Dragon control and length add to the complexity of each puzzle. Enjoy Vs. mode and play with friends via Game Link Cable.
publisher:
Crave Entertainment NA/EU
Bottom Up JP

no_intro_name: Dragon Quest I _ II (Japan) (SGB Enhanced) (GB Compatible)
overview_en:
Dragon Quest (ドラゴンクエスト, Doragon Kuesuto?, titulado Dragon Warrior en América del Norte) es el videojuego original y el primero de la saga Dragon Quest. Fue desarrollado por Enix y lanzado en 1986 en Japón para MSX y Famicom (NES).
Fue uno de los primeros videojuegos de batalla por turnos en obtener un gran éxito y es considerado un pionero en el desarrollo del género. Precediendo a Final Fantasy y junto con esta otra saga RPG, Dragon Quest pasaría a ser una franquicia exitosa que se convertiría en un estándar para los videojuegos de rol.

title_en: DRAGON QUEST III - SOSHITE DENSETSU E...
no_intro_name: Dragon Quest III - Soshite Densetsu e... (Japan)

title_en: DRAGON QUEST MONSTERS 2 - MARUTA NO FUSHIGI NA KAGI - IRU NO BOUKEN
no_intro_name: Dragon Quest Monsters 2 - Maruta no Fushigi na Kagi - Iru no Bouken (Japan) (SGB Enhanced) (GB Compatible)

title_en: DRAGON QUEST MONSTERS 2 - MARUTA NO FUSHIGI NA KAGI - RUKA NO TABIDACHI
no_intro_name: Dragon Quest Monsters 2 - Maruta no Fushigi na Kagi - Ruka no Tabidachi (Japan) (SGB Enhanced) (GB Compatible)

title_en: DRAGON QUEST MONSTERS - TERRY NO WONDERLAND
no_intro_name: Dragon Quest Monsters - Terry no Wonderland (Japan) (SGB Enhanced) (GB Compatible)

overview_en: Dirk the Daring is back! Control the fate of Dirk the Daring in the long-awaited return of Dragon's Lair, now for Game Boy Color. The fair princess, Daphne has been seized by the evil dragon, Singe and only Dirk the Daring can rescue her from his clutches. On your quest, you must fight your way through the castle of the dark wizard who has enchanted it with treacherous monsters, traps and other obstacles. Lead on brave adventurer!

It's off to Dragon Land with your favorite Dragon Tales friends. Wish on Dragon Scale and get whisked away to Dragon Land. Then choose your adventure from five different fun-filled stories. While searching for Dragon Berry cupcakes, gems, and musical Notes you will travel to magical places like Puzzlewood in the Crystal Caves! So grab your Dragon Scale and let's Go!

The popular animated television series is now a magical hand-held game! You take on the role of a dragon that has yet to learn the secrets of flight in this exciting adventure. You'll attend Quetzal's School in the Sky, where you'll practice your wing flapping, hovering, treasure carrying, and breathing. Once your confidence is high and your skills honed, you'll enter the enchanted Dragon Land, where all sorts of mischief awaits you. Journey through 15 levels of difficult obstacles and dangerous terrain, meeting up with a few friendly faces straight out of the television show along your path. There are three difficulty levels to choose from, so gamers at all skill levels can get in on the action. The game is only intended for one player, but you can always complete a game and then challenge a friend to match your progress. Learning to fly has never been so fun or safe.

no_intro_name: Dragon Warrior I _ II (USA) (SGB Enhanced) (GB Compatible)
overview_en:
Dragon Warrior I & II is a 2000 Game Boy Color video game developed by Tose and released by Enix America in the USA on September 27, 2000.

Step back into the wondrous land of Alefgard and defeat the evil DracoLord in the standard-setting Dragon Warrior I. Continue your amazing adventure and banish the foul Hargon in Dragon Warrior II. With tons of monsters to fight, treasures to find and mysteries to explore, you may never want to turn off your Game Boy Color again!

Dragon Warrior III is a 2001 Game Boy Color video game developed by Tose and released by Enix America in the USA on July 17, 2001.

Your father, the brave Ortega, is dead. He set off to destroy the Demon Lord Baramos but fell in glorious battle. Unless stopped, Baramos will unleash a torrent of evil that will destroy the world. You must stop Baramos and discover the legend of Dragon Warrior! Your journey starts on Aliahan. Only you decide where it ends...

no_intro_name: Dragon Warrior Monsters (USA, Europe) (SGB Enhanced) (GB Compatible)
overview_en:
In Dragon Warrior Monsters, enter Terry’s Wonderland, a magical place of kings, monsters and magic spells.  Make monsters your allies to fight through the dangers that lie ahead in the long quest.  Find your kidnapped sister and become the most powerful monster master in the world!

Each monster has unique special skills to use in battle.  Train and treat them well, and you’ll be victorious!  Over 40,000 different combinations - can you breed the rarest and most powerful monsters?

* Over 200 cute & cool monsters to collect, tame, and train.
* Breed your trained monsters to make more powerful monsters, each receiving special skills from their parent monsters.
* Play solo, or use the Game Link cable to link to Game Boy game systems and battle and breed with your friends’ monsters.
* A spin off of Japan’s best selling RPG game, Enix’s Dragon Quest.

no_intro_name: Dragon Warrior Monsters 2 - Cobi's Journey (USA) (SGB Enhanced) (GB Compatible)
overview_en: When Cobi and Tara's family of monster farmers moves out to the island of GreatLog, it quickly becomes apparent that all is not well in their new homeland. The island's prince, Kameha, and his ill-willed accomplice, Warubou, quickly confront the brother-and-sister team. Now, the dastardly pair has embarked on a plot to sink the entire island, and you'll have to train an army of Dragon Warrior Monsters to help stop the evil crime. This installment casts you as the brother, Cobi challenging you to find hidden keys and prepare all of your monsters for battle. There are more than 300 battling beasts in all, which means that you'll have your work cut out for you if you hope to effectively utilize your troops. As you wander through the land, you'll encounter different monsters, which you can persuade to join your team by offering up treats. You can also trade beings with other players who own the game or have a copy of DRAGON WARRIOR MONSTERS 2: Tara's Adventure (the parallel release, which follows the story of Cobi's sister).

no_intro_name: Dragon Warrior Monsters 2 - Tara's Adventure (USA) (SGB Enhanced) (GB Compatible)
overview_en: The wildly successful DRAGON WARRIOR MONSTERS returns to handheld form with parallel releases DRAGON WARRIOR MONSTERS 2: Tara's Adventure and DRAGON WARRIOR MONSTERS 2: Cobi's Journey. This installment focuses on the efforts of the sister, Tara, as she tries to end an evil plot to stop her new homeland from sinking. Prince Kameha and his ill-willed accomplice, Warubou, are responsible for the mischief, and you've got to help Tara collect and train more than 300 fighting monsters in order to reverse the deadly plan. Make your way through the countryside, collecting valuable keys and recruiting monsters to help battle evil. Each beast you encounter will need to be persuaded to help you out, which you can do by offering up various forms of foods and treats. With better graphics than most of its competition, the game even lets you trade monsters with other players who own either installment of the addicting DRAGON MONSTER WARRIORS 2 collection.

In Driver, the driving (pun intended) force of the world is crime. The main character, an ex-race car driver, takes on the role of an undercover cop. It seems your superior officer has decided to put your talents to the test. He orders you to infiltrate the local mob group, and to help bring it down from the inside. As a result, the game takes place from the perspective of a low-level gang member. The action speeds into a number of different cities, ranging from San Francisco to Miami. It is on the streets that the main part of the game will take place. 

Basically, Driver is broken into a number of mini-missions. In total, over 30 different challenges await the persistent gamer. The missions are divided between the various locales of the game. The different assignments will each require a special tactic. As an example, consider the mission in which the objective is to destroy an enemy getaway vehicle. In such a situation, the primary goal is to keep an eye on the target and ram it into submission. If the orders are to pick up a gang member within a time limit, speed and secrecy become of utmost importance. If the cops see the exchange, the badges will be on you like glue. Each situation will require a measure of thought and intelligence. 

Driver also offers a couple of extra side games. The survival mode sets the player against a horde of maniacal police officers. The crazed cops will do anything to smash you into submission. The result is a race through the city with a bunch of cops on your tail. It is a test of endurance. In the getaway mode, the idea is to flee for safety from the encroaching stiffs. The game places you in an area of the city, with a cop on your tail. Your only goal is to avoid the authorities. Be careful, though, as the cops may set up a roadblock to impede your progress.

Driver is designed with the Game Boy Color in mind. It offers a password save system to keep your data under wraps.
Dropzone is an Action game, developed by Awesome Developments and published by Acclaim, which was released in Europe in 1999.

no_intro_name: DT - Lords of Genomes (Japan) (SGB Enhanced) (GB Compatible)
overview_en: Time is the near future. A nanomachine (ultra-small robot) called "DT" was developed in secret, and governments and giant companies were conducting intelligence activities over the technology. Players will fight as DT masters who make full use of cards that express DT, units, and skill data. There are about 200 types of cards, and the battle is a full-fledged battle with 40 decks and full strategy. Understanding the story on every card and using it effectively is the key to becoming a true master. The more you read the card novel written on the card, the deeper your knowledge and mystery of DT. "When you get all the cards, you embody the final evolution of life on Earth ..."

Is Game Boy Color man enough to handle Duke? You'd better believe it.

The master of one-liners and undisputed king of carnage has conquered Nintendo 64, and now he's preparing to get down and dirty on Game Boy Color. The most recent Duke Nukem titles have been played using a first-person perspective, but GT Interactive broke that pattern with Zero Hour for the N64, and this platform adventure for Game Boy Color. Duke's ego must be growing out of control now that millions of gamers will actually be able to admire his pumped-up pecs while playing.

Duke Nukem delivers 16 levels of alien annihilation, with a different visual theme for each area. Duke is equipped with all new moves for his small screen debut, including a perfect backflip which leads us to believe that he may have been dating a gymnast in the off-season.

Duke Nukem is compatible only with Game Boy Color.

title_en: DUKES OF HAZZARD, THE - RACING FOR HOME
no_intro_name: Dukes of Hazzard, The - Racing for Home (USA)

overview_en: Competitive dungeon RPG maker. Invade each other's dungeon created by you or your friends, and defeat the opponent's boss waiting in the enemy dungeon before your friends capturing your own dungeon to win! There are four dungeon types: "dungeon", "tower", "castle", and "jungle". There are more than 200 types of monsters that protect and attack dungeons. There are more than 200 types of items that can be obtained by searching dungeons and defeating monsters. By connecting the communication cable, you can play against your friends and trade monsters and items.

That life game has become GBC and is getting more and more powerful. There are three game modes: "Waiwai mode" where you can enjoy normal life games, "Love love mode" where you can enjoy your marriage, and "Yamatani mode" where you can enjoy a turbulent life. More than 1000 events such as university entrance exams, exams, and romance create a variety of life. A total of 16 people, including familiar characters such as Angel and Akuma, as well as Captain and Fuchu Alien, will appear. My character can be created as a montage, and more than 50 million patterns are prepared. Every time you clear the main game, Life Game Island will develop steadily. You can also enjoy 10 types of mini games.

As a portable Monopoly game, it has a save function, so you can enjoy it anytime. Full-scale without any unnecessary rule changes. You can enjoy various modes such as "Tournament Mode" where you win 4 tournaments against CP characters and "Free Play" where you can play freely. There are 15 characters. Each character makes a big difference in playing.

title_en: E.T. - THE EXTRA-TERRESTRIAL AND THE COSMIC GARDEN
no_intro_name: E.T. - The Extra-Terrestrial and the Cosmic Garden (USA)
overview_en: He might be wrinkled and a little bit slimy on the outside, but his heart is pure gold. Perhaps the most famous cinematic space alien ever to capture kids' imaginations, E.T. stars in this delightful adventure for the Game Boy Color. The title character's green thumb comes out to make its presence known in this installation of the story (remember, E.T. is an excellent gardener). Help the little guy travel to the farthest reaches of space collecting specimens of various plants for the Cosmic Garden that lives on his spaceship. Once you've collected all of the plants, the object of the game is to make sure they can stay alive in the Garden. New friends, Space Bee and Space Slug a couple of adorable additions to the saga will assist you. With addicting gameplay, excellent graphics, and classic characters, this is one game that's certainly worth phoning home about.

If you have any doubt as to E.T.'s ability to help you get organized, witness the stunning efficiency with which he expressed his desperate need to make a phone call. There's no need for a separate digital organizer anymore, as you can now keep track of your life on a Game Boy Color. Everyone's favorite little alien being provides a calendar, an address book, a working clock, and even a "to-do" list that will keep young science fiction fans motivated and productive. There are even five mini-games included, several of which involves helping the titular mascot evade the authorities and collect the necessary items to construct an inter-global telephone system. One of the games challenges you to raise a "Flopgopple" pet, and all of the options are compatible with the Nintendo Game Boy Printer. Kids can even protect all of their personal data with the use of an original password. Now, that's organization.

title_en: E.T. - THE EXTRA-TERRESTRIAL - ESCAPE FROM PLANET EARTH
no_intro_name: E.T. - The Extra-Terrestrial - Escape from Planet Earth (USA)
overview_en: As long-time fans of the classic film know, it's not easy being a visitor on another planet. This handheld game for the GBC closely mirrors the plot of Steven Spielberg's 1982 classic science fiction masterpiece, putting you in the shoes of E.T. or his human friend, Elliot. Of course, the game's main objective is to collect the parts necessary to construct an interplanetary communicator that E.T. can use to "phone home." All the while, Earth-based authorities will try to apprehend you, so make sure you bring your wits and reflexes to the table. There are 45 quests in all, each of which presents new traps and obstacles to avoid, and the game even has three separate difficulty levels to master. With six main game areas and 10 detailed environments, E.T. THE EXTRA TERRESTRIAL: Escape from Planet Earth has unusually high replay value, wonderful graphics, and more gameplay than you can shake a stick at.

no_intro_name: Earthworm Jim - Menace 2 the Galaxy (USA, Europe) (GB Compatible)
overview_en: Earthworm Jim is back, and he's brought a ton of mayhem and destruction with him! EARTHWORM JIM: Menace 2 the Galaxy is the second Game Boy Color adventure for everyone's favorite worm-turned-superhero. Playing as Jim in this one-player action game, you must blast your way through 12 bizarre stages packed with enemies and other hazards. To aid you in your endeavor, you'll be able to pick up and use four different weapons to toast your foes. The typical wry humor present in the EARTHWORM JIM series is here as well, resulting in some crazy situations for you to jump, shoot, and fly your way through. Although EARTHWORM JIM: Menace 2 the Galaxy is compatible with all Game Boy systems, it includes a special exclusive level when played on Game Boy Color.

When the wrestling-license musical chairs ended last year, Acclaim must have felt like it was on the hurtin' end of a Stone Cold suplex, what with EA snagging the WCW license from THQ and an enraged THQ, its spirit meter jacked up to stratospheric levels, responding by wresting the prized WWF license from Acclaim's grasp.

All's fair in love and corporate lumberjack matches, though, so Acclaim pulled itself off the canvas and went out in search of a new franchise. The answer lay as close as the nearest TV, where Extreme Championship Wrestling (ECW) holds court weekly on The Nashville Network. Sealing the deal for a long time to come, Acclaim has invested some of its many WWF and Turok bucks in the ECW.

Elevator Action EX is an update to the Game Boy version of Elevator Action published by Altron in 2000. In addition to colour, players can choose between three characters: Mike, an all rounded character, Guy, a slower yet more durable character, and Sarah, a faster yet weaker character.
publisher:
Taito JP
TDK Mediactive EU
BAM! Entertainment NA

no_intro_name: Elie no Atelier GB (Japan) (SGB Enhanced) (GB Compatible)
overview_en: After graduating from the academy and A gaiden story that is a little different from the main story (PS version). Elfir (commonly known as Erie) and Marlone (commonly known as Marie) are alchemists in Saarburg. For some reason, such Erie and others decided to take care of the fairies in the atelier. The purpose given to Erie and others is to "grow a half-serving fairy into a full-fledged fairy in four years." There are many things that fairies have to learn, such as collecting ingredients, dodging monsters, and blending items! The character of a fairy changes in various ways depending on how it responded to the fairy and what kind of behavior the fairy did. Can Erie and his friends raise a good fairy alchemist? Events and characters are different from the Marie version.opening up a alchemy shop, Elfir Traum is requested by the fairy tribe's elder to take care of an apprentice fairy.

ESPN INTERNATIONAL TRACK & FIELD brings all the excitement of a real athletic contest to Game Boy Color. Try to win the gold medal in 12 different events including fencing, skeet shooting, the 100-meter dash, the long jump, the javelin toss, 100-meter freestyle swimming, 110-meter hurdles, the high jump, weightlifting, the pole vault, the gymnastics vault, and table tennis. Each event requires a mix of speed, stamina, and timing to succeed it’s all about the button mashing! Can you win all the events and become the ultimate champion? Full-colored, detailed graphics bring the knuckle-busting action to life. Use the Game Boy Link Cable to hook up with a friend and challenge him or her to a two-player contest to see who can win the most medals. This game includes battery backup to save all your high scores and world records.

Exciting NHL action comes to the Game Boy Color with ESPN NATIONAL HOCKEY NIGHT. Since the game is fully licensed by the NHL, all of the teams (including the expansion Columbus Blue Jackets and Minnesota Wild) and players are here. When you want a quick puck fix, play a single game in the Exhibition mode. True hockey fanatics will want to take all of the challenges of a full Season, but if you're not interested in hockey until it's Cup time, you can skip the season and go straight to the Playoffs. If you think you are as good as anyone in the NHL, you can even put yourself into the game with the Create-a-Player mode. Now you can literally get into the game with ESPN NATIONAL HOCKEY NIGHT.

Sporting 16 fully licensed team and stadium endorsements, European Super League brings together the talent from many teams in Europe to create a 'European Super League Championship'.

Features:
- Entries from clubs such as AC Milan, Bayern Munich, Marseille, Liverpool, Chelsea and Paris Saint Germain
- Stadiums are modelled to real-life specifications
- Control interface when played in novice mode is limited to simple button combinations, allowing for a newcomer to play the game more easily; for the advanced gamer, the alternate mode, although more complex and demanding, will give them improved control over the game
- Authentic crowd chants

Follow in the tire tracks of America's most beloved stuntman, Evel Knievel! Experience Evel's live-on-the-edge lifestyle as you pull off death-defying feats ordinary men only dream of! With all the stunts, all the excitement, and none of the broken bones, you control the actions of the most daring man in history!
publisher:
Rockstar Games NA
Take 2 Interactive EU

overview_en: In an attempt to takeover the world, the newly liberated and powerful ectoplasmic forces, led by the half-human, half-demo Count Mercharior, have kidnapped two key members of the Extreme Ghostbusters team. Without wasting a second, Eduardo and Kylie jump into the famous Ecto-1 ambulance and race off to the rescue... Play as Eduardo and Kylie as you uncover the clues to the kidnapping, confront the evil Count Mercharior and return your teammates, Roland and Garrett, to safety!

title_en: EXTREME SPORTS WITH THE BERENSTAIN BEARS
no_intro_name: Extreme Sports with the Berenstain Bears (USA, Europe) (En,Fr,De,Es,It)
overview_en: Get extreme with Mama, Papa, Brother, and Sister Bear in their first Game Boy Color game, EXTREME SPORTS WITH THE BERENSTAIN BEARS! In this single-player game you'll control the members of the family as they participate in an assortment of extreme sports events. Use Brother or Sister Bear in kayaking, dirt boarding, biking, and luge, or take the whole family in the river rafting and toboggan sequences. All of the events take place from an overhead perspective, which provides the best view of the playing field. In each event you can perform a wild range of tricks and stunts to gain speed and shave seconds off the clock. Can you beat the high scores and become the best bear you can be? Well-animated characters set on colorful, detailed backgrounds ensure a bright presentation.

F-1 World Grand Prix straps you into the driver's seat as you experience the high-octane rush of an actual Formula One season. Compete in the FIA Formula One World Championship with your choice of 22 drivers. You'll race through 17 of the most challenging Formula One circuits. Five game modes including: Grand Prix, Exhibition, Time Trial, Challenge and Two-Player. Realistic racing effects include real-time tire wear, skid marks and exhaust flames.

Supersonic jet dogfighting comes to the small screen in F-18 THUNDERSTRIKE for the Game Boy Color. In this one-player flight sim, you take the role of a daring pilot who's flying an elite fighter jet. Slide into an inside-the-cockpit view, battle against multiple enemies, and practice your aerial combat and evasion maneuvers to prove your air superiority. You can play in either Arcade or Simulation mode, each affording you a unique experience. Arcade mode offers looser controls that make things easier for rookie pilots, while experts will want to jump right into Simulation mode, which will challenge the ability of even the most experienced flyboy. Head into multiple missions of dogfighting action and perform aerial tricks that will break the sound barrier, but don't think that it's all fun and games. When the mission's complete, you'll have to carefully land your jet on an aircraft carrier.
publisher:
Majesco Sales NA
Take 2 Interactive EU

overview_en: F1 CHAMPIONSHIP Season 2000, featuring all the drama, action, and emotion of the 2000 season, takes the player right to the heart of the thrilling world of Formula One racing. Re-live the gladiatorial battles between Michael Schumacher and David Coulthard or tear up the record books and take an outsider to World Championship glory. In-depth behind the scenes technical support from the Orange Arrows and Benetton Formula One teams allows the game player to enter the world of Formula One racing in unprecedented detail and authenticity.

Strap yourself in for high-octane excitement in F1 RACING CHAMPIONSHIP for Game Boy Color. The goal of this game is to provide a realistic Formula 1 racing experience in every aspect: the game has the full F1 license, which gives you a choice of 11 real racing teams such as McLaren and Ferrari. Choose the vehicle that suits your racing style, then take to one of 16 real licensed tracks, each accurately modeled to reflect its real-life counterpart. You can play in multiple gameplay modes, including a quick Single Race or the more grueling Formula 1 Championship. Watch the action from several camera angles, including a behind the vehicle view and first-person perspective. The full color graphics contain large, detailed vehicles and smoothly animated tracks that help to put your right in the middle of the action. As an added bonus, try to prove your championship skills by taking on a friend with the link cable Two-Player mode. F1 RACING CHAMPIONSHIP is only compatible with Game Boy Color systems.

title_en: F1 WORLD GRAND PRIX II FOR GAME BOY COLOR
no_intro_name: F1 World Grand Prix II for Game Boy Color (Japan) (En,Ja)

title_en: FAIRY KITTY NO KAIUN JITEN - YOUSEI NO KUNI NO URANAI SHUGYOU
no_intro_name: Fairy Kitty no Kaiun Jiten - Yousei no Kuni no Uranai Shugyou (Japan) (SGB Enhanced) (GB Compatible)

overview_en: Brace yourself for a soccer game that brings all of the wild fun of soccer home on your Game Boy Color! FIFA 2000 is a fully-licensed soccer game that has more than 60 teams from around the world with updated rosters appropriate to the 2000 season. You can choose to play one of five different gameplay modes. Exhibition mode is a quick game where you set the teams and the rules then hit the field. In Tournament mode, you'll square off against an assortment of other teams to see who can take home the final victory. Playoff mode has you playing the final teeth-to-the-grindstone matches where every victory counts. In League mode, you'll play through a full season that culminates in the playoffs to see who is the greatest. Finally, Indoor mode takes the game inside and changes up the rules a little bit, resulting in a fast-paced version of the original. Options available for every mode include weather settings, foul settings, wind, and more. You can also use the password to save all of your stats in League and Tournament modes.

Despite having thousands of remakes in different systems, Final Fantasy Adventure was still missing a Game Boy Color version, so here it is!

Changes in this version are:

Full colorization
New world map (the old one was basically an empty space with 4 or 5 house icons)
Some of the bugs in the original game are fixed here: after casting Heal your defense power is not reduced anymore; a moogle item can now be used to heal a moogle status.
Inspired by the great hack made by xenophile, the sprites of the main characters are displayed in the char name selection menus.

In Fix & Foxi - Episode 1 Lupo you must help the plucky and cool Lupo on his incredible adventure to make it through the enchanted lands and out the other side alive and in one piece! You only have a certain amount of lives to make it through each level so tread wisely and jump on all the enemies to eliminate them and collect the precious coins they leave behind!
Flipper & Lopaka is an Action game, developed by Planet Interactive and published by Ubisoft, which was released in Europe in 2001.

PC fans craving real-time strategy action on Game Boy Color may have found their title with FORCE 21. In the year 2015, World War III has broken out. Technology has progressed to the point that air-based nuclear attacks are ineffective, so warfare will be conducted the old-fashioned way: through large-scaled attacks of armored units and infantry. In this one-player strategy or action game, you'll choose to either control the American or the Chinese military forces, each side comprised of the same eight different unit types. From the speed and power of a tactical helicopter attack to the all-out brawn of a platoon of tanks, you'll have all the warfare options you'll need to carry out your plan of attack. In order to complete the game, you'll have to battle your way through 16 different missions that take place all over the world, in such locations as barren snowfields, yawning deserts, and crowded cityscapes.
Formula One 2000 is a Racing game, developed by Tarantula Studios and published by Take-Two Interactive, which was released in 2000.
You will need courage, cunning and teamwork to beat the traps and pitfalls the Fort has in store and carry of its legendary treasure.

It's tough to be a frog! Life isn't all lazy days and lily pads--it abounds with dangers. Can you help Frogger survive some perils and spring him home to safety? First hop your frogs across a busy highway. Then cross a raging river to reach the safety of home. But your frogs will have to leap away from one danger after another before they're safe. Watch out for the tricky diving turtles...jump away from the frog-eating snakes...hop from the jaws of the hungry alligators!

title_en: FROM TV ANIMATION ONE PIECE - MABOROSHI NO GRAND LINE BOUKENKI!
no_intro_name: From TV Animation One Piece - Maboroshi no Grand Line Boukenki! (Japan) (SGB Enhanced) (GB Compatible)
overview_en: The second Game Boy version of "ONE PIECE" RPG! Solve the incidents that occur on the landed islands, find the "log pose" that will be the door to your next adventure, go to all the islands, and complete the nautical chart. The first order is the original route, and the second order is the original story of the game. The game system has been greatly enhanced from the previous work. "Shocking action system" where the character accidentally takes action, "Dream combo" which is a dynamic combined attack that is launched when certain conditions are met, "Adrenaline battle" where you can release powerful special moves according to the character's anger, etc. Is newly added. Communication is possible not only in online battles and character exchanges, but also in the previous work "Dream Luffy Pirates Birth!"

title_en: FROM TV ANIMATION ONE PIECE - YUME NO LUFFY KAIZOKUDAN TANJOU!
no_intro_name: From TV Animation One Piece - Yume no Luffy Kaizokudan Tanjou! (Japan) (SGB Enhanced) (GB Compatible)
overview_en: Weekly Shonen Jump, a popular anime game on TV. Select the route you want to go from the blank map, play new adventures and events, and gather crew members to join. When you clear the event, that part will be added to the map. The player moves the blank map with the crew, clears various events, defeats the enemies on the field, and aims to complete the map. By selecting the episode, you can enjoy the story as it was originally written or your own original story. Of course, you can play online battles with your friends and exchange characters. Open up the world yourself!

You can easily enjoy detailed and realistic machine settings (engine, tires, body) like a real F1. Machine (team) can be selected from 8 types. Equipped with a full-scale world tour mode that aims to become a world champion by racing on all 16 courses around the world, including Japan, England, and Australia. In addition, a single race mode where you can choose your favorite course and enjoy the race, and a time attack mode aiming for the fastest lap are also installed. Of course, the communication function allows two people to fight hotly.

title_en: FUSHIGI NO DUNGEON - FUURAI NO SHIREN GB 2 - SABAKU NO MAJOU
no_intro_name: Fushigi no Dungeon - Fuurai no Shiren GB 2 - Sabaku no Majou (Japan) (AFMJ)

overview_en: All the other space pilots have been eliminated. Somehow you survived. The Galaga enemies are on the move. Now, you must fight or doom Earth to extinction. There's no time to plan strategies. Just find your targets and come out blasting. Battle wave upon wave of alien attack craft in this dazzling edition of the arcade classic. Use special weapons, retrieve captured craft to multiply your firepower and of course, rack up big points in the Challenge Stages. This is Galaga - Strap yourself in and come out firing!

title_en: GAMBLER DENSETSU TETSUYA - SHINJUKU TENUN HEN
no_intro_name: Gambler Densetsu Tetsuya - Shinjuku Tenun Hen (Japan)
overview_en: This is the story of a legendary game master who was called "Jongsei" in the mahjong world. A four-player mahjong game of the mahjong manga "Tetsuya-The Legend of the Gambler" serialized in Weekly Shonen Magazine. You can enjoy the characters and episodes of the TV anime version, as well as various Ikasama-themed games anytime, anywhere. "Scenario game mode" where you play against experts according to the story, "Free game mode" where you can freely set characters and rules, and "Communication game mode" where you can play a combination game with 2 players vs. 2 computers. , Equipped with game modes such as "Dunch's Mahjong Course Mode" that is easy and fun to remember.

Game and Watch Gallery 3 (Known as Game Boy Gallery 4 in Australia and Game Boy Gallery 3 in Japan) is a  1999  flash back to the '80s with original and updated versions of five Game & Watch hand-held games! Relive the birth of hand-held gaming in Classic Game & Watch games. Then join your favorite Nintendo characters in Modern versions featuring improved play control, graphics, color and sound! The Classic and Modern versions of Egg, Greenhouse, Turtle Bridge,
Mario Bros., and Donkey Kong Jr. are unlocked by default. Flagman, Judge, Lion,
Spitball Sparky, Donkey Kong II, and Fire must be unlocked by earning stars.
The hidden games only have Classic versions.

Flash back to the '80s with original and updated versions of five Game & Watch hand-held games! Relive the birth of hand-held gaming in Classic Game & Watch games. Then join your favourite Nintendo characters in Modern versions featuring improved play control, graphics, colour and sound!

The first Hudson "Game Boy Color" compatible. The masterpiece of strategy simulation has evolved further. A total of 100 offensive and defensive maps, and the computer's thinking engine speed has increased by 30% from the previous work.

An orthodox strategy simulation in which a magnificent strategy runs through the battlefield. The player becomes the commander of the Red Star Army or the White Moon Army and gives instructions to his army to occupy the capital of the enemy army or to annihilate the enemy's troops. The game mode is "Beginner mode" where you can learn how to play and units while playing 16 types of maps, "Campaign mode" where you can fight through all 45 types of maps according to the scenario, and you want to play from all 60 types of maps. There are three "standard modes" where you can freely select the map. It also supports "Mobile System GB", and you can "download maps" and "call mercenary units".

no_intro_name: Game _ Watch Gallery 2 (USA, Europe) (SGB Enhanced) (GB Compatible)
overview_en:
Game & Watch Gallery 2 features six games based upon the Game & Watch brand of handheld games. Each game contains a 'Classic' mode, resembling the gameplay and presentation of the original Game & Watch title, and a 'Modern' mode, which contains revised graphics and additional features. For every 200 points players accrue in each game, they earn 'stars' which can be used to unlock additional features, entries in an in-game gallery displaying animations of other Game & Watch titles, and a sixth game, Ball; up to five stars can be earned in each mode and difficulty of each game, for a total of 120 stars.

Ball: The player juggles two to three balls in the air, requiring the player to catch and toss them up again, with one point earned for each successful catch. In the 'Modern' version, Bob-Ombs will also sometimes appear, which the player must avoid catching; multiple playable characters can also be unlocked.
Chef: The player moves left and right to catch food in their frying pan to toss up into the air. In the 'Modern' version, the player can rotate and turn on the spot to feed Yoshi.
Donkey Kong: The player moves left and right and jumps to avoid barrels, making their way up platforms and ladders towards Donkey Kong. In the 'Modern' version, platforms disappear and levels change for greater variation.
Helmet: The player moves left and right to avoid tools falling from the sky, making their way between two doors, with a point awarded for every journey. In the 'Modern' version, a button on the floor occasionally appears, awarding coins for bonus points if stomped upon.
Parachute: The player controls a boat, and must collect parachutists before they fall into shark-infested waters, in which case a life is lost. In the 'Modern' version, parachutists sometimes land in a cannon to be shot back into the sky.
Vermin: The player moves left and right to hit moles with a hammer as they appear out of ground. In the 'Modern' version, the player controls Yoshi, who can also move up and down, and must guard eggs from vermin that come from all sides.

no_intro_name: Game _ Watch Gallery 3 (USA, Europe) (SGB Enhanced) (GB Compatible)
overview_en:
Game & Watch Gallery 3 is a 1999 Game Boy Color video game developed by Nintendo R&D1 and Tose and released by Nintendo of America in the USA on December 6, 1999.

Flash back to the '80s with original and updated versions of five Game & Watch hand-held games!

Relive the birth of hand-held gaming in Classic Game & Watch games. Then join your favourite Nintendo characters in Modern versions featuring improved play control, graphics, colour and sound!

Egg - Catch your eggs before they hatch!
Turtle Bridge - Carry the packages across the turtles' backs!
Green House - Protect your plants from the pesky pests!
Mario Bros. - Help Mario & Luigi keep the factory flowing!
Donkey Kong, JR. - Grab the key and free DK!

-Save & Quit feature lets you stop and restart your game anytime!
-Battery-backed memory saves all your scores!
-Collect stars to access new features and open hidden classic games!

title_en: GANBARE GOEMON - MONONOKE DOUCHUU TOBIDASE NABEBUGYOU!
no_intro_name: Ganbare Goemon - Mononoke Douchuu Tobidase Nabebugyou! (Japan) (SGB Enhanced) (GB Compatible)
overview_en: "Goemon Goemon" is now available as a collectible role-playing game. The feature of this time is the collection of "Mononoke". There are 146 types of unique "Mononoke" of various attributes and aristocrats. What is unique is not only the appearance but also the skill that each person has to liven up the battle scene. "Mononoke" can be made friends by using the "Fuin" command during battle, and becomes stronger by gaining battle experience with Goemon. Furthermore, it is possible to inherit special skills by fusing "Mononoke" with each other. Raised mononoke can be played against or exchanged via communication.

no_intro_name: Ganbare Goemon - Tengutou no Gyakushuu (Japan) (GB Compatible)
overview_en: The main character is Hajime, an active and adventurous fourth grader. Now, there is a Goemon boom among children, and Hajime is of course an enthusiastic Goemon fan. One day, when I went to my grandma's house in the countryside, I heard a legend about a big tree towering in the forest of the company, and out of curiosity, I went through a big hole in the trunk of the big tree. Suddenly, a dubious bandit attacks Hajime and asks Ebisu Maru to help him with a close call. Hajime was back in time in the Edo period! He heads to Oedo to meet his longing Goemon, but Goemon goes to the mountain of deception to recover the treasure stolen by a bandit called the Tengu Party. In this way, Hajime and his friends were involved in this incident ... The player is a modern elementary school student who is the main character. The hero solves the incident that happened in Oedo while traveling back and forth between Hyundai and Oedo. In Oedo, we meet friends such as Goemon and Ebisu Maru and cooperate with each other. Each character has a unique special move, and there is also a combined attack by multiple people. The theme is adventure and friendship. In a heartwarming story, the friendship between the main character and the Goemons is depicted.

A nurturing RPG that develops various adventures while nurturing the robot pet "Halo" who longs for the player with the master in battles and mini games. There are more than 120 types of robots that Haro transforms into 44 titles! Equipped with a "combinize" system that can be transformed into various robots by incorporating halo into various parts. Find out the rules of combination of parts and create the strongest robot data. Even in the four mini-games, halo will be trained and strengthened. You can also play online battles and convert parts and robot data with your friends. Moreover, you can create new Robo data by shining the light beam on Robo data using the infrared function!

title_en: GB KARAN KORON GAKUEN - HANAFUDA MAHJONG
no_intro_name: GB Karan Koron Gakuen - Hanafuda Mahjong (Japan)

title_en: GEKISOU DANGUN RACER - ONSOKU BUSTER DANGUN DAN
no_intro_name: Gekisou Dangun Racer - Onsoku Buster Dangun Dan (Japan)

title_en: GENSOU MADEN SAIYUUKI - SABAKU NO SHIJIN
no_intro_name: Gensou Maden Saiyuuki - Sabaku no Shijin (Japan)
overview_en: The story after Sanzo and his group went to Tianzhu. At one point, there was a dispute over which was stronger, Red Boy or Gojo, and he decided to hold a martial arts tournament to see who was stronger. The player chooses one of the eight characters and participates in the martial arts competition. The purpose is to walk anywhere on the map, talk with the people you meet there, raise the level while fighting with youkai, and win the tournament.

title_en: GET CHUU CLUB - MINNA NO KONCHUU DAIZUKAN
no_intro_name: Get Chuu Club - Minna no Konchuu Daizukan (Japan) (Rumble Version) (SGB Enhanced) (GB Compatible)

overview_en: Even a lost island hideaway in the wet South Pacific isn't far enough away from the long arm of Rez. While GEX was whiling away the hours living on the fruits of his recent successes, the madman of the Media Dimension was working on his new hobby - secret agent-napping. Agent Xtra was now struggling for her freedom as a hostage in the lair of Rez. As a master of disguise, GEX had his work cut out for him. Another descent into bad TV movies is at hand. To the GEXCaves!

no_intro_name: Gex - Enter the Gecko (USA, Europe) (GB Compatible)
overview_en: After saving the television realm from destruction, Gex retired to Maui. Unfortunately, Rez has returned and wants to take over the television realm again. Now Gex must come out of retirement. Guide him through 26 levels, each with a number of missions to complete. Finishing a mission will earn a remote control; collect enough remotes and new stages open. In all of the levels, Gex will have to either avoid or fight enemies. Luckily, he is equipped with a tail that can whip the bad guys into shape. To further aid in the fight, Gex can eat flies that will grant him an extra life or increase the power of his attacks, among other things. Help the gecko with attitude save the television realm in GEX: Enter the Gecko.
publisher:
Crave Entertainment NA
Interplay Entertainment EU

overview_en:
Unlike its big 3D brother on the PC and Playstation 2, Gift for the Game Boy Color is a top down 2D action game.

As Gift, a small cute red devil-like creature with an attitude, players must save Lolita Globo and defeat the Shadow of Black Deep Dark Night. To do so Gift must find seven treasures and seven gnomes in seven different worlds. Worlds are divided in rooms, in rooms puzzles have to be solved, and enemies fought. Finally each world is guarded by a level boss.

GOBS OF GAMES brings many childhood games to the Game Boy Color. The 16 different games are broken into four categories: Paper games, Peg games, Puzzle games, and Board games. The Paper games include Hangman, Dot Boxes, Triangle Boxes, Share, Color Snakes, and Tic-Tac-Toe. Peg Game is a series of boards in which the goal is to remove all of the pegs by jumping over them. Scramble and Move It are Puzzle games, and the only Board game is Checkers. All of the games can be played solo, but some can also played against another person via a link cable. Try to relive your younger days with GOBS OF GAMES.

Giant monsters are attacking Earth, and Godzilla, a 200-foot tall, fire-breathing lizard, is the only thing that can save the world. Unfortunately, the military wants to destroy all giant creatures, good or bad. You take control of Godzilla as he travels through seven action-packed levels. In each one, Godzilla must work his way past the military to fight a giant monster. Luckily, Godzilla has fire breath that will destroy almost anything. While fighting through the levels, Godzilla will earn new attacks like the stomp, bite, and tail-whip. Will Godzilla be able to save the planet from the monster menace? Find out by playing GODZILLA: The Series.

Aliens are creating mutants on Earth, and it is up to Godzilla to save the planet from the giant monsters in GODZILLA THE SERIES: MONSTER WARS. You take control of the giant lizard in 10 levels of action that take place in deserts, cities, and underwater. Free-scrolling technology gives you total control of Godzilla, and new cross-hairs improve the accuracy of Godzilla’s attacks that include fireball, tail whip, bite, claw, stomp, and flame breath. As an added bonus, all of the attacks can be linked together for unlimited combinations. And you are going to need those combinations to destroy the 16 types of enemies that Godzilla will face. Try to save the planet from giant monsters and aliens in GODZILLA THE SERIES: Monster Wars.

title_en: GOLD AND GLORY - THE ROAD TO EL DORADO
no_intro_name: Gold and Glory - The Road to El Dorado (USA)
overview_en: After stowing away on Cortes's ship bound for the New World, Miguel and Tulio find themselves in a strange land with no food. However, they do find part of a map that might lead them to El Dorado, the lost city of gold. You take the role of either Miguel or Tulio as they search 20 levels of action that span swamps, rainforests, Spanish galleons, and even El Dorado for treasure and the other pieces of the map. Along the way, the heroes will have to fight bulls, native warriors, Spanish soldiers, wild boars, and rhinos, and they'll also have to brave the Circle of Fire. Luckily, the heroes are equipped with swords to dispatch any problems they might run into. If you play the game well, you just might get to ride Altivo, the horse. Help Miguel and Tulio find GOLD AND GLORY: The Road to El Dorado.

Power and atmosphere are powered up! Not only the shot screen, but also the flying ball scene and just before the cup-in are all progressing in 3D scene. Since data such as the undulations, conditions, and wind of the ground are prepared, you can devise a game strategy that is the same as real golf. When selecting a club, the short cursor displays how far you will fly. When playing a match, if the opponent's ball comes within 50 cm of the cup, you can judge the victory or you can gear cup yourself, so the game will develop smoothly. In online competition, you can have a hot fight against each other's clubs, and you can get a new club set depending on the number of points.

title_en: GOLF OU - THE KING OF GOLF
no_intro_name: Golf Ou - The King of Golf (Japan) (SGB Enhanced) (GB Compatible)
overview_en: There are 54 holes in 3 courses, Japan, USA and World. The world is made up of 9 difficult holes from Japan and USA, but the distance is getting longer and more difficult. Since the pin position changes from game to game, you can play with a fresh feeling no matter how many times you play. In addition, the course situation created by changes in wind direction and their combinations is infinite! There are three online matches, which are regular hole matches plus Dracon and Near Pin. Each course can save up to the best 5 scores, so you can always see the emotional record. In addition, you can print your scorecard on a pocket printer, so you can show off your hole-in-one or Albatross to your friends.

Familiar with pet food commercials, the dog Gonta has become a game! An adventure game where you can enjoy Gonta's easy everyday life. Players can become Gonta and enjoy the Gonta world. Many CM scenes also appeared in the game. BGM is all that I have heard once.

A puzzle game where you go around 7 archaeological sites around the world, move letters such as "katakana" and "hiragana" to match the keywords, combine words, and solve the mystery. The seven locations in the world are the ruins of Japan, northern Syria, Greece / Rome, Scandinavia, Ireland, Maya Steka, and Mu. Five stages consisting of three questions are prepared for one stage, and 105 questions are prepared in all seven places. The player can move the disjointed letters up, down, left and right to create a word that suits the subject. The number of answers to clear one theme varies depending on the stage and is 3 to 11. There are also various help cards.

Experience for yourself every classic car chase ever seen. Race at breakneck speed through an immense, living city out-running and out-witting rival gang members, mercenaries, hired killers and an entire police force.

Drive dozens of varied vehicles around three of America's toughest cities. Only the best will be able to tame the fastest cars. Only the smartest will know all the short-cuts and the whereabouts of the hottest wheels. Only the toughest will be able to take on the world and finish the job like a professional...

Grand Theft Auto comes to Game Boy Color! Seven ruthless gangs are involved in a brutal power struggle. Make a name for yourself, but watch your back. Respect is earned, not given. Intelligent gang system - earn and maintain the respect of gangs to get the best jobs and special favors or play the gangs off against each other in turf wars. Completely open and non-linear gameplay frees you to carve your own way to the top. Fully reactive urban environment which responds to your every move.

The main character, Yuhi, and his friends Mizuki and Shirou, were sent from school to another dimension in the wake of a certain incident. It was a girl named Sue who helped Yuhi, who had lost her mind after being separated from Mizuki and Shirou. Liete, the caretaker of the world who knows that Yuhi and others are human beings in another world, teaches that "keys" scattered all over the world are necessary to return to the original world. Yuhi embarks on a journey with his encouraging ally Justin Sue Fina to collect the "keys" and return to the original world with his friends. Why did Yuhi and his friends get lost in another dimension? "Grandia", synonymous with adventure, is now available on GBC! A full-scale RPG that follows the flow of SS and DC versions. Depending on the play, a completely different scenario will occur and the number of party members will increase. As with the Grandia series, IP (Initiative Point) gauges are used for battle. Place actions on the gauge for each character and fight using battle cards. Depending on the placement of the cards, defensive effects and combos of techniques may occur, requiring strategicity. There are many types of cards such as magic and techniques, and you can learn new techniques by synthesizing them. You can also play against friends and card trading using online battles.

no_intro_name: Great Battle Pocket, The (Japan) (SGB Enhanced) (GB Compatible)

overview_en: In this game, the film's hero, Gizmo, attempts to find the gremlins and capture them all. In the meantime, the sinister Stripe and his army of 30 different gremlins decide to invade the town of Kingston Falls and try to transform Gizmo into a gremlin. The game can be played as either character. Gremlins: Unleashed! features 10 levels based in locations featured in the film, including Billy's house, the school laboratory, the department store, and the movie theater.

GBC version of the picture book "Hanamaru-kun" for young children. Educational software that allows you to learn the knowledge you need in your daily life through games such as errands, hideouts, and shiritori. You can enjoy the story as if you were watching a TV program, and you can study without knowing it.

no_intro_name: Gute Zeiten Schlechte Zeiten Quiz (Germany) (GB Compatible)
overview_en:
Good Times, Bad Times: The Quiz for GameBoy Color - The quiz about the series!

Features:

- Over 1000 questions about the series and stars
- Seven subject areas
- Approx. 3000 different answer options
- Single player mode against the clock

Which do you know best? Whether it's love, fate, trick or deception - seven subject areas with over 1000 questions ensure fast-paced guessing fun in Good Times, Bad Times: The Quiz for GameBoy Color. Think carefully about the answer, but also make sure that your fellow player doesn't snatch the point from under your nose in Good Times, Bad Times: The Quiz for GameBoy Color.

title_en: GYOUTEN NINGEN BATSEELOR - DOCTOR GUY NO YABOU
no_intro_name: Gyouten Ningen Batseelor - Doctor Guy no Yabou (Japan)
overview_en: Comic BomBom's popular manga game. It is also a TV anime. The game is a role-playing game linked to the story of a manga. The player controls the main characters Guts and Jeanne to fight Doctor Guy. You can collect stickers of various characters as the game progresses. The stickers collected in the game can be exchanged with friends by communication.

Halloween Racer is an racing game with a Halloween theme. It mostly reassembles a karting game, where you choose one of the different characters and race through each track of the game to win the Halloween trophy. To do so the player have to beat the competing monsters for each of the five tracks. On the road there is goodies to collect and traps to avoid to make it more challenging. Before going into the championship each track can be played in practise mode.

A training simulation game that raises hamsters and aims to become a breeder master. Select one of the three animals, "Shigecchi", "Boo-chan", and "Endo-kun", and raise and breed them based on the funds you have. If you participate in various competitions (cups), you will compete for the hamster's ability and cuteness. Up to 4 hamsters can be kept in one cage at the same time. Of course, it is compatible with communication cables and can print cute hamsters.

The second hamster breeding simulation game. In addition to the familiar "Shigecchi", cute new characters are appearing one after another. A new mini-game has been added to the new story, and it is full of fun and cuteness. Comes with a mascot doll as a first-time limited benefit.

title_en: HAMSTER MONOGATARI GB + MAGI HAM NO MAHOU SHOUJO
no_intro_name: Hamster Monogatari GB + Magi Ham no Mahou Shoujo (Japan)

overview_en: "Hamster Paradise" where you can make a cute hamster a pet. Hamsters' behavior, personality, and behavior change depending on how they are raised and taken care of. When raised with love, hamsters perform tricks (such as ball riding) and perform various gestures. You can use the communication cable to meet your friend's hamster or race in a racing game. You can take a picture of a hamster's funny gesture and print it with a printer.

First of all, I got a hamster from Dr. Hamuzou of the ham center. Give the hamster you got a cute name. Basically care! If you grow up lovingly, your hamster will grow bigger and bigger. Grow carefully by feeding and taking a walk. If you take a walk with your hamster, there will be many events. You can get money by clearing the mini game. Use this money to buy food, toys, and birdhouses for your hamster. Hamsters can get married when they grow up. If you grow your hamster well, new species may be born. The game is more cute because it reacts more than a real hamster! ??

In this work, you can grow your favorite kind of hamster from Golden Hamster, Jungarian, and Roborovski. In addition to the mini rabbit that was popular in the previous work, a squirrel also appeared. There are also plenty of fun mini games to play with hamsters. In addition to familiar games such as ham wheels and ham catches, new games have been added, and there are more than dozens of them. The cage is also transformed into a two-story building. You can enjoy playing around by going up and down. Not only parks and shops, but also amusement parks and schools, where you can go out with hamsters has increased. You can now collect stickers that you can get at various places in the game, and exchange emails with your friends via infrared communication.

The hamster paradise series is now even more cute! The types of hamsters that can be raised have increased to eight types: Golden, Jungarian, Roborovski, Blue Sapphire, White, Black, Panda, and Pudding! In addition, it has become possible to keep two hamsters at the same time. When you feed them, you can see cute gestures that the two animals share and eat. You can marry your own hamsters or play with your friend's hamsters using the communication function. The contents of the mini-game have been renewed, new walking places have been added, 16 new types of hamsters can be discovered, and you can meet the discovered hamsters at "Maison de Hamster".

Hamtaro hops from your TV to your Game Boy Color for an adventure starring all the Ham-Hams from the hit animated series! See school yards, supermarkets, and other everyday places from the viewpoint of the pint-sized hamster. Help him round up his fellow Ham-Hams and meet back at the Clubhouse for a big surprise!

title_en: HANA YORI DANGO - ANOTHER LOVE STORY
no_intro_name: Hana Yori Dango - Another Love Story (Japan)
overview_en: Tsukushi Makino, the main character of the general people, who entered the high school of Eitoku Gakuen of the super bourgeois school, which is dominated by the ultra-high-class boys' four-member group "F4", at the request of parents aiming for "Tama no Koshi", is just a sober school life. I was going to send it. However, my friend accidentally kicked F4 leader Tsukasa Domyoji, and the rugged Tsukasa cut a rebellion against F4, so it's hard! Tsukushi's school life will change completely. "Your guts, I'll rehash you. Declaration of war!" The game story is based on the original comic volume 12 (episode of the teen of Japan). An adventure game in which the player becomes the main character, Makino Tsukushi, and weaves romance and friendship without losing the various hardships that occur in school life. Depending on your choice, you can enjoy the original story of each member of F4 and Tsukushi's elementary school classmate Aoike, who are not told in the original story. Adopted a multi-ending that allows you to enjoy the ending with each character according to the flow of the scenario followed by the player. If you play the game, you can enjoy the further charm of the character. Feel free to enjoy the development along with the original story or enjoy your own love story!

title_en: HANASAKA TENSHI TENTEN-KUN NO BEAT BREAKER
no_intro_name: Hanasaka Tenshi Tenten-kun no Beat Breaker (Japan) (SGB Enhanced) (GB Compatible)
overview_en: Tenten-kun, who is very popular in Weekly Shonen Jump, will appear. It's exciting to think of a music puzzle like adding Pazuru Dama and Beatmania and dividing by two. Anyway, let's aim for a big chain by pressing the button at the right time according to the music.
Hands of Time is an Action game, developed by Mirage and published by Titus Software, which was released in 2001.

title_en: HARLEY-DAVIDSON MOTOR CYCLES - RACE ACROSS AMERICA
no_intro_name: Harley-Davidson Motor Cycles - Race Across America (USA)

title_en: HARRY POTTER AND THE CHAMBER OF SECRETS
no_intro_name: Harry Potter and the Chamber of Secrets (USA, Europe) (En,Fr,De,Es,It,Nl,Pt,Sv,Da)
overview_en: Ignoring Dobbya the house-elf's grave warning that disaster will strike if he returns to Hogwarts, Harry embarks on his second year to find Dobby's predictions coming true! Harry soon finds himself entangled in a dark plot against his "Mudblood" classmates, as students keep turning up petrified! Could Draco Malfoya be to blame, or is something even more malevolent at work? With the help of returning friends Hermione, Ron, Hagrida and Hedwiga, players attend new classes to learn second-year spells that will aid them in a quest to uncover the true identity of the "Heir of Slytherin".

title_en: HARRY POTTER AND THE SORCERER'S STONE
no_intro_name: Harry Potter and the Sorcerer's Stone (USA, Europe) (En,Fr,De,Es,It,Nl,Pt,Sv,No,Da,Fi)
overview_en: Unlike other game versions of the first Harry Potter book, the Game Boy Color rendition of Harry Potter and the Sorcerer's Stone is a traditional roleplaying game, complete with NPCs to talk to and random beastie battles to challenge you. The game begins with the receipt of an acceptance letter into Hogwarts School of Witchcraft and Wizardry. From there, you (as Harry Potter, of course) will go shopping for your school supplies, catch the train on the 9 3/4 platform, take a boat ride, and finally arrive at your new home.

title_en: HARRY POTTER TO KENJA NO ISHI
no_intro_name: Harry Potter to Kenja no Ishi (Japan)
overview_en:
Harry Potter & the Mystical Halo is a Bootleg/Shoot 'Em Up video game published by Vast Fame released on August 2nd, 2002 for the GB Color.

This is an unlicensed Chinese shoot 'em up known as "Harry Potter 3".
