Rebuild the farm of your grandfather and start raising cows, chickens and sheep. Keep them happy and they’ll make you rich! Discover the fantastic Harvest Moon world with cool friends ready to help you succeed in your mission.

- The awaited Harvest Moon sequel for GBC with even more fun!
- Choice of playing a boy or girl farmer
- Hours and hours of gameplay
- Hidden arcade games include Mole Bash and Cherry Cup Horse Race
- Special Game Link cable options allow trading between Harvest Moon 2 and Legend of the River King 2
publisher:
Victor Interactive Software JP
Natsume Inc. NA
Ubi Soft EU

overview_en:
The third entry in the down-home series of RPGs boasts a bevy of new options and features. You can play as a male or female farmer, get married, play with new pets and enjoy new minigames.

Essentially a farming role-playing game, Harvest Moon 3 requires you to clear a patch of land, till the soil, plant seeds and tend the new shoots. Take a twice-weekly ferry to the mainland (the island locale is new to this game) to purchase animals and other supplies.

Despite -- or perhaps because of -- the lack of swordplay, magic spells and other traditional RPG fare, the Harvest Moon series exerts its own unique charm that has won over thousands of would-be farmers worldwide.
publisher:
Victor Interactive Software JP
Natsume Inc. NA

overview_en: You have inherited the family ranch from an ancestor. With only a shed of rusted tools and a small amount of money, you must prove yourself worthy of owning the ranch by returning it to its former glory. To do this, you must till the soil and cultivate vegetables. When you have earned enough money, you can add chickens and livestock to help increase your profits. While you work, you will receive visits from the local townsfolk, who will ask for your help. You should always help them as much as possible, because they will be willing to return the favor later. Once you have built your ranch to a significant level, you can trade it with other farm masters via link cable. Try to restore the family ranch in HARVEST MOON.

Harvest Moon GBC is a 1999 Game Boy Color video game developed by Victor Interactive Software and Tose and released by Natsume Inc. in the USA on November 25, 1999.

You have inherited the family ranch from an ancestor. With only a shed of rusted tools and a small amount of money, you must prove yourself worthy of owning the ranch by returning it to its former glory. To do this, you must till the soil and cultivate vegetables. When you have earned enough money, you can add chickens and livestock to help increase your profits. While you work, you will receive visits from the local townsfolk, who will ask for your help. You should always help them as much as possible, because they will be willing to return the favor later. Once you have built your ranch to a significant level, you can trade it with other farm masters via link cable. Try to restore the family ranch in HARVEST MOON.

no_intro_name: Hello Kitty no Beads Factory (Japan) (SGB Enhanced) (GB Compatible)
Hello Kitty no Magical Museum (Japan) (SGB Enhanced) (GB Compatible)
overview_en: Hello Kitty no Magical Museum is a Puzzle game, developed by Atelier Double and published by Imagineer, which was released in Japan in 1999.

title_en: HELLO KITTY NO SWEET ADVENTURE - DANIEL-KUN NI AITAI
no_intro_name: Hello Kitty no Sweet Adventure - Daniel-kun ni Aitai (Japan) (SGB Enhanced) (GB Compatible)

overview_en: Hello Kitty comes to the Game Boy Color with HELLO KITTY'S CUBE FRENZY. The objective of each stage is simple: Kitty must collect all of the items scattered throughout each level. However, you can only tell Kitty to move left or right, and if you are not careful, Kitty will fall off the edge and say hello to the grim reaper. Luckily, blocks fall from the sky, which can be rotated and used to create staircases and bridges to the objects. However, placing three blocks with identical colors next to each other will make them disappear; this can both help and hurt. In addition to the block problems, Badz Maru, Hanamaru, and Pandaba will wander around and cause problems for Hello Kitty. Can you handle the pressure and collect all of the items in HELLO KITTY'S CUBE FRENZY?

title_en: HELLO KITTY TO DEAR DANIEL NO DREAM ADVENTURE
no_intro_name: Hello Kitty to Dear Daniel no Dream Adventure (Japan)
overview_en: Kitty and Daniel have a London date together for the first time in a long time! It was a lot of fun, but Daniel has to go back to New York tomorrow. For Kitty, who feels lonely, Daniel presented her with a stuffed blue rabbit. However, one night, when Kitty wakes up with a noise, what a stuffed rabbit is running! Kitty chased a stuffed rabbit. When the stuffed rabbit stood in front of the mirror in the living room and cast a mysterious spell, the mirror glowed and the stuffed rabbit jumped into the mirror. Following the stuffed rabbit, Kitty jumped into the mirror ... This time, Kitty will take a big adventure in the fushigi world! A romantic Kitty and Daniel love story unfolds in a world where the past, present and future are mixed. If you change your costume during the game, you can power up Kitty's action. "Boss battle" appears at each turning point of the story! Compete in a game different from the action stage. There are lots of extra elements this time too!

Are you a true God?

You are Hercules, son of Zeus, and you must prove you are a true God to mortal eyes. Get ready for an extraordinary journey! This thrilling game, based on world-known TV series by Universal, mixes fast-paced action and adventure.

-Wide range of characters and adventures riddled with several missions and pitfalls.
-Link mode: play with your friends and exchange characters if you have Titus game Xena on Game Boy Color; Play as Xena in Hercules game and as Hercules in Xena game. You will access to hidden worlds.

"Suya Suya" was the first friend of a player who had transferred to Ukiuki Town. However, there is something wrong around them playing with them. Everyone in Ukiuki Town has fallen asleep! that? Did you sleep too? The player is awakened by "Herohero-kun", but everyone else stays asleep. It seems that you have to go into your dreams to wake everyone up ... Kodansha's "Comic BomBom" and NHK Educational TV's popular "Herohero-kun" are now available! !! An orthodox RPG, but a "role-playing gag" game that mixes gag and laughter. The secret of popularity is the unique personality of the characters that appeared! You can enjoy a wider world of heroes, such as the appearance of characters recruited for readers in "Comic BomBom". The main character of the game can be selected from "boy" or "girl", and the gag changes depending on the selected main character. The main character can also communicate via infrared communication.

Travel to a world of wizards, knights, dragons, and minotaurs in HEROES OF MIGHT AND MAGIC. You can choose from four different heroes and take control of part of a map. The goal is to defeat the other three warlords and rule the entire map. In order to do this, you must travel throughout the land, finding new areas and new towns. If you can get a town to help you, you can recruit new warriors and uncover information to find artifacts that will increase your powers and abilities. When you encounter the enemy, the armies square off in tactical combat where you can try to cut down the opposition with ranged attacks or cause status problems with magic spells. Destroy the opposition and rule the world in HEROES OF MIGHT AND MAGIC.

title_en: HEROES OF MIGHT AND MAGIC II
no_intro_name: Heroes of Might and Magic II (USA) (En,Fr,De)
overview_en: If you love role-playing games, you're sure to be jazzed about the fact that they've started releasing more of them for the Game Boy Color. Now you can take the power of the influential HEROES OF MIGHT AND MAGIC series with you wherever you go, challenging yourself with the intense action of this awesome sequel. Choose from a selection of unique hero types (including eight new ones) to take through this epic quest, gathering resources, creatures, and additional party members along the way. In addition to the new hero types, there are an amazing 30 total character classes for monsters those you control and those you fight against. The object is to gather enough material to create an entire army, taking your force into battle against those of enemy warlords. Dedicated fans of the series will definitely want to pick this one up as there is material that is exclusive to this GBC-only release. Don't have a GBC? Well, this is a perfect excuse to pick one up.

no_intro_name: Hexcite - The Shapes of Victory (USA, Europe) (SGB Enhanced) (GB Compatible)
overview_en: The world's best strategy games have two things in common: they start with a deceptively simple board and the goal of taking territory from your opponents. Now HEXCITE brings a whole new shape to strategy games. In HEXCITE, 1 or 2 players battle to dominate the board with pieces of different shapes and sizes. Like any great strategy game, HEXCITE is simple to learn, but challenging to master. And every round is unpredictable until the last play. Who knows? HEXCITE could be the shape of things to come!
publisher:
Ubi Soft NA/EU
NEC Interchannel JP

title_en: HISSATSU PACHINKO BOY - CR MONSTER HOUSE
no_intro_name: Hissatsu Pachinko Boy - CR Monster House (Japan)
overview_en: The model includes the super popular "CR Monster House". Not only the LCD screen of the actual machine, but also the movement of the pachinko ball is realistically reproduced! There are 3 modes in total. In the "capture mode", you can set the cash rate and simulate the play at a pachinko parlor while checking the balance status, rotation speed, number of jackpots, number of reach, etc. "Tamare mode" is a mode that allows you to start digitally at any time. You can change the jackpot probability and enjoy the digital movement of the LCD screen. In the "Reach Catalog", you can see all the reach patterns of Monster House at any time.

no_intro_name: Hole In One Golf (USA) (Rumble Version) (SGB Enhanced) (GB Compatible)
overview_en: It's a quiet day on the links. You tee up your ball, and drive it 200 yards down the center of the fairway, leaving a 150-yard approach shot. After taking the approach shot, the ball stops rolling 3-feet from the pin. On the green, you sink the relatively easy putt, and you start your round with a birdie. While most golfers never have days like this, they can with HOLE IN ONE GOLF. Get out on three different courses and try to get the lowest score possible. However, the courses are located in rural areas, so you never know when birds, squirrels, or bears will come onto the course and mess with your shots. Try to play the round of your life with HOLE IN ONE GOLF.
Hollywood Pinball is an Action game, developed by Tarantula Studios and published by Starfish, which was released in 1999.
The eponymous Game Boy version of "Quest 64", or in other regions called "Quest: Fantasy Challenge".

The content of the game includes 3 competitions, "Koikoi", "Oicho Kabu", and "Flower Matching". A gem of thinking that even Hanafuda enthusiasts will groan, such as abundant option settings and formidable opponents with full-scale thinking. "Winning mode" and "Free battle mode" are available. In "Winning Mode", 7 characters appear as opponents, and the competition can be played in the order of "Koikoi", "Flower Matching", and "Oicho Kabu", and the strength of the rivals will increase as they win. "Free battle mode" is ideal for training, as you can freely select your favorite competition and character.

no_intro_name: Honkaku Shougi - Shougi Ou (Japan) (SGB Enhanced) (GB Compatible)

title_en: HONKAKU YONIN UCHI MAHJONG - MAHJONG OU
no_intro_name: Honkaku Yonin Uchi Mahjong - Mahjong Ou (Japan) (SGB Enhanced) (GB Compatible)
Hot Wheels - Stunt Track Driver (USA, Europe) (SGB Enhanced) (GB Compatible)
overview_en: The little die-cast cars from Matchbox make their way to the Game Boy Color with HOT WHEELS STUNT TRACK DRIVER. You can choose from five different Hot Wheels cars, including Way 2 Fast, Tow Jam, Shadow Jet, Saltflat Racer and the Twin Mill each with unique strengths and weaknesses. After picking the right car, take it for a test drive on one of the six tracks in the Single Race mode. When you want some stiff competition, try to win successive races in the Tournament mode. And if your friends think they can drive better than you, make them prove it with the two-player link cable option. In all of the modes, the key to winning is to maximize your speed by pulling off big stunts. Find out if you have what it takes to become a Hot Wheels Driver in HOT WHEELS STUNT TRACK DRIVER.

If you like to play cards, then you should get a copy of HOYLE CARD GAMES. There is a total of 14 different games to play including six variations of solitaire (Four Free, Golf Par 6 and Par 7, Klondike draw 1 and draw 3, and Pyramid), Crazy Eights, Cribbage, Gin, Go Fish, Hearts, Old Maid, Spades, and War. When you play, you can choose from 14 different personas like a balding professor, a crocodile, and a teddy bear. You can also play against a friend using the same system or via a link cable. Now you don't have to worry about finding a full deck of cards when you want to play, thanks to HOYLE CARD GAMES for the Game Boy Color.

All of the excitement of beating the house in Las Vegas or Atlantic City can be put in the palm of your hand with HOYLE CASINO for the Game Boy Color. You can gamble your money away in seven different games: Blackjack, Video Poker, slots, Roulette, Craps, Pai Gow, and Poker. Learning how to play each game is easy, thanks to the tutorials included. All of the games are played just like they are in real life you get to see the dealer's hands as he deals the card, and you get to shake the dice in Craps. In most of the games, digitized voices call out the hands or the winning numbers. As an added bonus, you and a friend can link up to play any of the table games together. Now's your chance to try and break the bank in HOYLE CASINO.
Hugo 2 1/2 is an Action game, developed by Bit Managers and published by Infogrames, which was released in Europe in 1999.

The evil Scylla is back and this time has found a way to make herself the most powerful witch of all time and take over the world. For this, she requires very rare black diamonds, which are to be found on the jungle island where the Kikurians live. She takes them all prisoner and forces them to work day and night in search of black diamonds. The elder King Kikurian asks Hugo the troll to liberate the slaves and stop Scylla's plot before it is too late. When Fernando arrives a letter from King Kikurian, Hugo reads it, but finds poor King Kikurian imprisoned in a cell and unable to help his people, and has absolutely no time to waste. Can Hugo free all the slaves and stop Scylla's plot?

The wicked witch Scylla wants to get rid of Hugo the troll once and for all. She has used her powers to trap Hugo in a magic mirror that she then cracked it into three pieces and magically scattered the fragments across the world. Scylla also once again kidnapped Hugo's wife, Hugolina. Hugo and Hugolina's three children, Rit, Rat, and Ruth, are the only ones who can free their parents. To break the witch's curse, each child must find a piece of the broken mirror. If the kids put the mirror together, Hugo is able to defeat Mirror Scylla and break the spell. After the fight Hugo gets out of the mirror, traps Scylla in it and smashes it into little pieces, and saves Hugolina.

title_en: HUNTER X HUNTER - HUNTER NO KEIFU
no_intro_name: Hunter x Hunter - Hunter no Keifu (Japan)
overview_en: Everything is a hunter legend that starts here. Aim to become a hunter by participating in the "Hunter Exam" that appeared in the Weekly Shonen Jump series "Hunter x Hunter". A character who has become a hunter can be selected as a master when creating a new character, and episodes of that technique and item can be reproduced and passed on to the next generation. By combining the items that appear in the game, more than 400 types of items will appear. It is also linked to the "Hunter x Hunter" card released by Bandai, and you can get various effects such as acquiring items by entering the 8-digit code printed on the card. The package includes 3 out of 6 original limited edition Carddass.

title_en: HUNTER X HUNTER - KINDAN NO HIHOU
no_intro_name: Hunter x Hunter - Kindan no Hihou (Japan)
overview_en: On the way back to Whale Island after leaving the sky stadium, a storm hits the ship and the ship is in distress. After arriving at a mysterious island, Gon begins exploring the island in search of the missing Kirua. There are various archaeological sites on the island, full of dangerous beasts and traps! Can you really solve the mystery of this island and find the lost Kirua? The second GBC-only game, a completely original story. The stage is structured according to the atmosphere of the original manga. Whereas the previous work was a simulation, this time it is a side-scrolling type action game in which Gon and Kirua are very active. There are experience points and levels, so even formidable enemies can easily win if they challenge after raising the level! Recommended for those who are not good at action games!

Hype: The Time Quest is an action and adventure game where you can interact with NPCs in fighting as well as in dialogue in search of information, goods, and services. You play has Hype, a medieval knight who happens to fall victim to the curse of Barnak. During this time, he is thrown into the past here he must find his way back. Will his future become worst from anything he does during this time in the past?

title_en: HYPER OLYMPIC SERIES - TRACK _ FIELD GB
no_intro_name: Hyper Olympic Series - Track _ Field GB (Japan) (SGB Enhanced) (GB Compatible)

title_en: IDE YOUSUKE NO MAHJONG KYOUSHITSU GB
no_intro_name: Ide Yousuke no Mahjong Kyoushitsu GB (Japan)

title_en: INDIANA JONES AND THE INFERNAL MACHINE
no_intro_name: Indiana Jones and the Infernal Machine (USA, Europe) (En,Fr,De)
overview_en: The Communists are trying to reassemble a machine that will open the door to a parallel universe. However, many of the key parts are missing. It is up to you as Indiana Jones to search the globe and recover the pieces before the Soviets do. You will have to run, jump, swim, and fight his way through 19 levels of action. Luckily, you can use a whip, pistol, machine gun, and grenades on the Soviet soldiers, spiders, scorpions, snakes, wolves, jaguars, sharks, jellyfish, and poisonous lice you encounter. After completing a level, you will be treated to a cinematic clip that will advance the plot and reveal the password you need to continue the game. The world will only be safe when the missing parts are recovered and the Communist threat is quelled in INDIANA JONES AND THE INFERNAL MACHINE.

The evil Dr. Claw is about to unleash the deadly MadKactus virus on the world, and it's up to Inspector Gadget to stop him. Since Gadget always needs a little help, his niece Penny and their dog Brain are at the ready to make their contribution. You, as the enigmatic Inspector, will have to work your way through 20 levels that span five different worlds. Luckily, many of your famous devices are available to help out including the helicopter, spring arms, rocket-powered roller skates, and hammer hat. If there is something that you can't do as Gadget, you can switch characters and use Penny or Brain to get past an obstacle or solve a puzzle. Gather up your go-go gadgets and get ready to save the world from Dr. Claw in INSPECTOR GADGET.
The classic karate fighter is back on the Game Boy Color, remade with the nostalgic gameplay that fans around the world will adore, and new playmodes to keep the action fresh and exciting. HIYAH!
International Rally is a Racing game, developed by Konami Computer Entertainment Nagoya and published by Konami, which was released in 1999.

Konami's premier soccer franchise, INTERNATIONAL SUPERSTAR SOCCER, has come to the Game Boy Color. You can choose your team from 36 international squads that include traditional powerhouses like Brazil and Italy, as well as some less-respected teams like the United States and Cameroon. After you select your team you will compete in pool play for the International Cup. If you are not ready for the international limelight, you can play and Exhibition game or participate in a League. During the game there are number of coaching options available, like the ability to pick your formations and match-ups. When you get a big winning streak going, you can keep track of your progress with a password. Now you can enjoy the world's most popular sport without getting dirty with INTERNATIONAL SUPERSTAR SOCCER.

So, you don't think realistic international soccer is possible on the Game Boy Color? Think again; INTERNATIONAL SUPERSTAR SOCCER 99 has all of the rules, physics, and intensity of the real thing. You can play as any of 32 worldwide squads, competing for the rights to the International Cup. Choose whether you want to play three, five, or seven-minute halves, and decide whether you want your overtime decisions to be made Golden Goal or Extended Time-style. The gameplay and decisions are so detailed, you can even select your starting lineup and reserve players, pick a formation, and set up your own strategies. You can engage in any number of exhibition games (alone or against a friend), but the real fun begins in International Cup mode, in which you claw your way up from a ranking of 32nd in the world. Beginners and seasoned veterans alike will get plenty of mileage out of the game, as there are three different difficulty settings to master.

With International Track & Field it takes a little bit more to be a champion. Ten grueling decathalon events put your stamina and your will power to the test as you battle it out with athletes from around the world. Heart-pumping gameplay and vibrant graphics truly capture the pageantry of International competition. Be careful not to get too caught up in the global spotlight - or you may find yourself missing from the victory podium!

no_intro_name: It's a World Rally (Japan) (SGB Enhanced) (GB Compatible)

title_en: ITSUDEMO PACHINKO GB - CR MONSTER HOUSE
no_intro_name: Itsudemo Pachinko GB - CR Monster House (Japan)
overview_en: The super popular pachinko machine "CR Monster House" is now available on GB! Faithfully reproduce from the movement of the ball to the reach action and the pattern of the jackpot. There are two modes in the game, "Story mode" where you play against monster characters such as the familiar witch Franken with quotas, and "Play mode" where you can find a strategy according to the platform, and the position and inclination of the nails are highlighted. There is also a function that you can check. It also has a backup function that allows you to save your money and progress, so you can easily play games while you are on the move or in a little spare time. This is the only way to play pachinko in GB!

A ported version of the soccer game that was a big hit with the Super Nintendo version. The appearance clubs are all 16 J1 teams at the time of 1999. There are a total of 256 players, 16 players per club. There are 4 modes. "Pre-season match" is a practice match with only one match. Let's get used to the operation here and challenge the J-League match. In the "J-League match", one team will be selected from all 16 teams, and 15 games and 2 championship games will be played on the 1st and 2nd stages. In "Communication Battle", you can enjoy a heated game of two-player battle. The match results are saved, and if you win, the number of spectators will gradually increase. In "Options", you can freely set the match time, stadium, rules, etc.

A full-scale simulation soccer game with J League (J1 and J2) + World Mode (Japan National Team). He becomes a manager when practicing, becomes a player during training and games, and sometimes becomes a manager. On the management side, you can not only get transfers and change directors, but you can also set admission fees. The official data of 16 teams for J1, 11 teams for J2, and 28 teams in total including the Japan national team are used. If you add 23 overseas countries and hidden teams, 52 teams will appear in the game. Up to 26 people can be registered for each team data. Player data is over 1300! The face of the edit player can also be created by the montage method. Of course, by using a communication cable, the trained teams can play against each other.

title_en: JACK NO DAIBOUKEN - DAIMAOU NO GYAKUSHUU
no_intro_name: Jack no Daibouken - Daimaou no Gyakushuu (Japan) (SGB Enhanced) (GB Compatible)

overview_en: "Jagainu-kun" is a music picture book game (a heartwarming dance that enhances the sense of rhythm). Choose story mode when playing for the first time. As the story goes on, the dance begins with a certain trigger. There are choices in the middle of the story, and the dance songs and the characters you meet will change depending on how you proceed. At first, the purpose is to select various routes and collect characters and dances. When you finish the story, the result will be reflected and you can make your own picture book, you can read it in "picture book mode", and you can also enjoy dancing with the songs and characters collected on the way. Unlike traditional music games, there are no commands, so it's simple, easy to remember, and easy to get used to.

title_en: JAGUAR MISHIN SASHI SENYOU SOFT - MARIO FAMILY
no_intro_name: Jaguar Mishin Sashi Senyou Soft - Mario Family (Japan)
overview_en:
Contains 32 patterns of Mario family cut embroidery data such as Mario, Yoshi, Princess Peach, Wario, and Goomba
Easily embroider with Game Boy Color! !!

The main character is Tsumorou, a Gutara university student who is scheduled to graduate next spring. The major is the teacher's egg in the teaching process. The time for practical training is finally approaching for the protagonist who has been a student. However, I wanted to practice teaching differently from others, so I decided to go to two schools and do each for a week. How can we make this training fruitful ... So the hero wondered. I wanted to make a club by making the best use of mahjong, which I am good at, and build a relationship of trust with the students. If you can't get the trust in your area of ​​expertise, then the hero isn't a teacher. Will there be a demon or a snake? Okite-breaking educational training is about to begin! A dream mahjong battle with 12 characters, straddling the two worlds of the two major elf titles, "Classmate" and "Lower Classmate"! There are two game modes, a "free match mode" where you can enjoy mahjong in earnest with two or four players, and a "story mode" where you can make the other girl cosplay in various ways if you win the game. The cosplay screen scrolls all over! You can see the girl's slightly embarrassing facial expressions and gestures. If you clear "Story Mode", you can proceed to "Interleague Play" where you play mahjong with the characters of the two schools. Cosplay that cannot be seen in story mode is added.

You can experience the future of racing today with JEFF GORDON XS RACING. Choose from five different cars and race on seven different tracks. You can use the Time Trial mode to get the fastest lap time possible on an empty track. In the Championship mode, you will have to race through two seasons. The first season has you racing against five other cars, and you must finish in first place overall to gain access to the second season. In the second season you will face seven other competitors, including Jeff Gordon. Win the second season, and you can challenge Gordon to a one-on-one race on any track you choose. Should your friends want in on the action, they can join you via a link cable. Get behind the wheel of a futuristic racecar and take first place in JEFF GORDON XS RACING.

Professional supercross racing comes to the Game Boy Color with JEREMY MCGRATH SUPERCROSS 2000. You can race with or against professional motocross riders like Jeremy McGrath, Travis Pastrana, Kevin Windham, Sebastian Tortelli, Jimmy Button, John Dowd, and Greg Albertyn. When you have selected the proper rider, you can race on any track in the Arcade mode. For a bigger challenge, work your way through the ranks to become champion in the 80cc, 125cc, and 150cc Seasons. In all of the races, you can gain an advantage by performing stunts to make power-ups appear, which you can collect to give you an advantage. Do you have what it takes to beat McGrath and the other professionals in JEREMY MCGRATH SUPERCROSS 2000?

title_en: JET DE GO! - LET'S GO BY AIRLINER
no_intro_name: Jet de Go! - Let's Go by Airliner (Japan)
overview_en: "JET de GO!", Which was popular in PS, is now available as GBC exclusive software. You can easily enjoy the actual aviation operations from takeoff, landing, and cruising. Weather changes such as rain and snow, and flights in the evening and midnight are also beautifully reproduced. Of course, you can take off and land at real airports (New Chitose Airport, Tokyo International Airport, Komatsu Airport, Nagoya Airport, Kansai International Airport, Matsuyama Airport, Hiroshima West Airport, Fukuoka Airport, Naha Airport) through the actual route. .. The initial appearances are three models, "J-31", "B767-300", and "B747-400D". As the game progresses, the aircraft becomes available.

title_en: JIM HENSON'S BEAR IN THE BIG BLUE HOUSE
no_intro_name: Jim Henson's Bear in the Big Blue House (USA) (En,Fr,De,Es,It,Nl)
overview_en: Come spend a day of fun and discovery with Bear and all his pals as you play through delightful lessons like Pondball, Feathers, and Popcorn. The BIG BLUE HOUSE has never been this much fun!
Jimmy White's Cueball is a pool game, developed by Vicarious Visions and published by Vatical Entertainment, which was released in Europe in 2000.

title_en: JINSEI GAME - TOMODACHI TAKUSAN TSUKUROU YO!
no_intro_name: Jinsei Game - Tomodachi Takusan Tsukurou yo! (Japan) (SGB Enhanced) (GB Compatible)
overview_en: Players create their own characters with montages (400,000 face patterns) and start with a baby. While growing "intellect," "physical strength," "sense," and "morality," clear life events such as going on to school, getting a job, and getting married, and aim to become a millionaire. Up to 50 characters created by the player can be registered and exchanged with a communication cable. In addition, you can enjoy "today's fortune-telling" and "compatibility fortune-telling" using the registered character data, and you can print it out with a pocket printer.

title_en: JORYUU JANSHI NI CHOUSEN GB - WATASHI-TACHI NI CHOUSEN SHITENE!
no_intro_name: Joryuu Janshi ni Chousen GB - Watashi-tachi ni Chousen Shitene! (Japan) (SGB Enhanced) (GB Compatible)

overview_en: JumpStart: Dino Adventure Field Trip is an Action game, developed by Digital Illusions and published by Knowledge Adventure Inc., which was released in 2001.

title_en: JUNGLE BOOK, THE - MOWGLI'S WILD ADVENTURE
no_intro_name: Jungle Book, The - Mowgli's Wild Adventure (USA) (En,Fr,De,Es,It)
Juukou Senki Bullet Battlers (Japan) (SGB Enhanced) (GB Compatible)
overview_en: A role-playing game in which you control a huge armed warrior "Bullet Butler" and seek the legendary "Ultra-Ancient Butler" in a different world "Alha Raus". We will proceed with the "collecting" and "raising" games of butlers with their own characteristics. Butler has a variety of shapes and abilities such as human type, insect type, animal type, marine life type, fantasy monster type, and dinosaur type. You can also search for hidden "rare" butlers, exchange data, and play against each other. As Butler grows up, he will speak to the player.

Supervised by JBC (Japan Boxing Association). The boxing life is beautifully reproduced in the game. Steady practice is a training simulation, and the game is a real-time action that actually operates the trained boxer. You can create and select your favorite boxer, and there are countless boxer creation patterns such as height, class, and face. It's up to the player to take advantage of their abilities and to train to reinforce their weaknesses. Not only the basic movements of boxing, but also the special moves unique to the game are hidden.

The monster hunting tournament, a specialty of the Kingdom of Iraldi, was held for the first time in five years. Of course, the main character Kevin aims only for the championship. The rules are simple! All you have to do is go through a pitch-black dungeon and defeat the monsters. However, in addition to seeing only a limited view in the dungeon, the attack is a turn system with a time limit. Therefore, the first step to victory is to devise a strategy by believing in your own intuition and as much time as you can. If you defeat a monster, you can get Montaku as proof. , You can take out a special ability called Montaku skill from Montaku, and you will power up by acquiring it. With infrared communication, you can compare your friends with Montak.

overview_en: Difficulty can be set at a level based on the Kanji Kentei from 7 balls to 2nd grade. The flow of the game can be played according to tasks, characters can be introduced, and children and adults can enjoy learning. Various other mini games are also available. There are also introductions to the Kanji Kentei and mock exams, which support players. The player starts after selecting the stage to challenge (6 stages in total).

Learning software supervised by the Japan Kanji Aptitude Testing Foundation. Learning software that is constructed based on questions that were actually asked in the past. This time, we have added "Children's Kanji Kentei Mode" and "Semi-Second Grade" for elementary school students and foreigners, and renewed a mini-game using kanji that can be played to take a break from the game. If you use a communication cable, you can play with your friends in the Kanji fast-press problem.

The third installment of "Kanji BOY" that makes you smarter while playing games. The number of questions recorded is over 7,000! As you play, you will naturally acquire kanji. There are two game modes. There is a "existing question collection mode" where you can play the exams from the 2nd to 10th grades that have been asked in the past, and a "mini game mode" where you can get idioms about your body, health, animals, and living.

You can enjoy the world of puzzle game magazines published in various ways on GB. Most of the kanji to be asked are 1006 kanji learned in the 1st to 6th grades of elementary school. Acquire perfect while playing antonyms, synonyms, stroke order, okurigana, homophones and idioms. There are four types of games: Kanji quiz "Spartan Z", Kanji crossword "Kankuro", "Kanji puzzle", and original puzzle "Elephant Dragon". It can also be used as a kanji learning tool for children from general education.

overview_en: On that day, I set foot on "Hokora", which has long been said not to be entered. According to a strange doctor who lives in the town, a mysterious underground world inhabited by unknown creatures spreads out beyond the hole of "Hokora", and fossils with life are buried in it ...・. Apparently, the guy next door, who is always fighting, went looking for a legendary monster. "Let's lose! I'm going on an adventure with courage!" At that time, the doctor's words came to my mind. "Without the power of friendship, you can't know the world ..." The fossil excavation game is back! Collect the fossil fragments buried in the dungeon and revive the monsters on the Lab's Reborn Machine. Various monsters can be created depending on the attributes and combinations of fossils. Some monsters evolve when the parameters of a specific character exceed a certain value. Strategicity has increased due to the advantages and disadvantages of the character's orientation, the compatibility between attributes, and the character's "friendship parameter". You can exchange monsters with a communication cable, or use a pocket printer to seal monsters.

Kawa no Nushi Tsuri 4 (Japan) (Rumble Version) (SGB Enhanced) (GB Compatible)
Kawaii Pet Shop Monogatari (Japan) (SGB Enhanced) (GB Compatible)
overview_en: A new sense RPG that raises pets while running a pet shop. The protagonist runs a pet shop on behalf of a sick grandmother and searches for a remedy for her. Pet shops can receive rewards if they receive requests from customers (want pets, deposit pets, pet medicine, etc.) and clear them by the deadline. Pets can be raised at the ranch in the pet shop, and the raised pets can participate in competitions (comparison of strength, foot race, etc.). Including the remedy for grandma, the medicine finds and formulates the ingredients by itself.

The second pet breeding RP game with very cute animals. The player manages the requests of customers who visit the pet shop well. Customers' requests include pet capture, custody, breeding, and drug preparation. The number of pets has increased from 38 in the previous work to 60. Lots of cute mammals to unusual reptiles. There are also 10 types of competitions such as disc catch competitions, gliding competitions, and diving competitions that test the abilities of the pets that have been raised. You can use the communication function to hold competitions and exchange pets.

Keep the balance! is a puzzle game, where you have to balance a big weighing scale. The longer it stays in balance the more point you gain. To do this, you have a catapult at your disposal, the objects you need to use to balance the scale are given to you by conveyor belt. One on the left and one on the right. But these objects differ in weight, so you must carefully choose the scales bucket you're going to put the objects in. To make things worse, all kinds of trouble appear on screen to make it just a little bit more challenging. Like crocodiles that eat object or jokers that throw around playing cards offsetting your carefully balance scale. The game stages 5 different game worlds each divided into 16 levels.

no_intro_name: Keitai Denjuu Telefang - Power Version (Japan) (GB Compatible)
overview_en:
2020. One of the most popular games for children who had few places to play was to use their mobile phones to go to the electric beast world and make friends with them. Since I get a phone number from Denju as a proof of my friend, making friends with a stronger Denju has begun to become a new status. In order to make friends with stronger electric beasts, children enter the inner part of the electric beast world, but there are electric beasts that have not yet come into contact with humans in the inner part, and the electric beast that is the bodyguard of the children Children are enthusiastic about fighting! A new boy / girl called "Denju Tsukai" has appeared, and the Denju boom has reached its climax. The main character, Shigeki, lived a life unrelated to such an electric beast boom, but decided to go to the electric beast world with the appearance of one electric beast. A new sensation RPG that makes full use of the functions of mobile phones to clear the game by turning "Keitai Denju Telefang" serialized in Comic BomBom into a game. The main character is Shigeki, a boy who longs for "T. Fanger" who uses electric beasts (monsters). The purpose is to battle with Denju, get the phone number of Denju, make friends with many Denju, and complete the address book of Denju. The point of the game progress is how to communicate with the electric beasts and humans and deepen the bond. If you use a communication cable, you can battle with your friends. If you win, you can get the phone number of the other party's Denju, but if you lose, your Denju's phone number will be erased from the memory. The power version and the speed version have different electric beasts.

The game was not released in English, and is best known among English audiences for the a bootlegged game version which was hacked and sold as a fake Pokémon game.

All of the action of professional baseball has been shrunk and put on the Game Boy Color with KEN GRIFFEY JR.'S SLUGFEST. You can play as any Major League team, complete with real players. Once you have the right team, play an Exhibition game to work on putting all aspects of the game together. If you want some extended competition, play a 26, 78, or 162 game Season, during which all of the performance stats for each player are tracked. If you don't want to deal with the ups and downs of a Season, skip right to the World Series and try to win it all. And if you don't have time for a full game, see how many dingers you can hit in the Home Run Derby. Will you be able to handle the pressures of professional baseball? The only way to find out is to play KEN GRIFFEY JR.'S SLUGFEST.

overview_en: A simple human figure drawn only with circles and lines. It's like a tree branch and hangs its neck. Below that eerie picture is a short message. "Wait at Shiomiso" That was the letter received by Akira Kawai, a freshman at Fudo High School. A letter whose sender and purpose are unknown. Is it just a prank? Or ...! ?? A detective novel game based on "The Kindaichi Case Files" serialized in Weekly Shonen Magazine. The player solves the serial murder case that occurred at the pension "Shiomiso" with the Kindaichi boy and the mysterious case that occurred 10 years ago while deciding the options. Of course, it is equipped with multi-scenario and multi-ending. Equipped with an "investigation mode" in which the scenario changes depending on how the player listens to the investigation, and an "operation status comment system" in which Akechi police evaluates the player's procedure with plenty of dislike. The scenario reading rate and scenario recollection mode are also adopted. Let's find the criminal in the name of Jichan!

Equipped with "SASUKE2000" that was aired as a special in the fall of 2000. Of course, there are also hidden competitions that are popular in the series, such as "Service Ace," "Power Force," "Super Shot," "Spray Hitter," and "Struck Out Bingo." Including the familiar Kane Kosugi, unique original players only for the game have also appeared! There are plenty of competitions where friends can play against each other with communication cable support, and new rules will expand the play.

overview_en:
his is an extensive hack of Kirby’s Dream Land 2 that provides support for the Game Boy Color, fully colorizing every visual asset of the game while also enhancing the overall experience.

FEATURES BREAKDOWN
    Full Colorization - All backgrounds, tilesets, and sprites have been fully colorized, taking full advantage of the GBC’s graphics capabilities.
    Extra Visual Snazz - Smoother fade effects, some color animation, and other little details to push the hardware just a bit more.
    Slowdown Eliminated - The GBC’s double speed mode is enabled to diminish virtually any lag present in the original game.
    All-new Settings Menu - Change the Status Bar Color, toggle color animation in the Status Bar, or toggle the Animal Friends’ BGMs interrupting the level music.
    SGB Support Intact - Play with the SGB border enabled in emulators that support the unofficial “SGB+GBC” mode.

Just like Legend of Zelda: Link’s Awakening DX and Tetris DX, Dream Land DX is a port of the monochrome Gameboy game to the Gameboy color. Experience Masahiro Sakurai’s first game in an all new light.

The gluttonous King Dedede has stolen all of the food from the inhabitants of Dream Land for a midnight feast, so Kirby, a resident of Dream Land, goes to retrieve the food and stop Dedede. Kirby's Dream Land plays like other platformers of the 8-bit and 16-bit era of video games: Kirby must use various natural abilities and occasionally external abilities or items while heading toward the goal at the end of each level. Like many 1980s-era platformers, the player can accumulate points, with an extra life granted when the player has enough points. However, because Kirby lacks a save function, scores are not recorded. Also, there are no save files, so the player has to start over again when the Game Boy is turned off, if the player chooses to return to the title screen after a Game Over, or if the player resets the game. All levels are played on a two-dimensional plane, letting Kirby move only left, right, up, and down. Kirby can walk, jump, and fly. Kirby can also inhale objects and enemies, swallowing them or spitting them out as projectiles.

Kirby Tilt 'n' Tumble is a 2001 Game Boy Color video game developed by Nintendo R&D2 and HAL Laboratory and released by Nintendo of America in the USA on April 9, 2001.

Peacefully sleeping in his Dream Land, Kirby drifts lazily amongst the beauty of the sky. A beauty that King Dedede cannot abide with. Jealous of the sky's wondrous splendor, King Dedede has acquired a tool that will let him steal the night's stars, plunging the world into eternal drab daylight. When Kirby awoke, he found that it was still daytime. And evermore, it would be daytime, unless Kirby made the journey to find King Dedede and recover the stars to restore the night's sky. So begins the latest Kirby adventure, another action adventure with the morphing marshmallow in a strange fantasy world. However, the one thing separating this latest adventure is the control scheme. Here, you don't control Kirby directly. Instead, you guide Kirby by tipping your system to roll the little round pink puff through a series of mazes. If you get in a jam you can make Kirby jump by a controller press, and Kirby can still acquire weapons from other enemies, but the real skill is using the tilting to your advantage.

Kirikou is a 2001 platform video game based upon the 1998 French film Kirikou and the Sorceress. It was developed by Étranges Libellules for the PlayStation, Planet Interactive for the Game Boy Color and Krysalide for Microsoft Windows. It was published Wanadoo.

The second in the Kisekae series! This time, the contents include all fashionable items, including accessories and hair arrangements. You can get various types of clothes such as casual, street, and romantic, and you can combine them freely. Of course, special clothes are also available! In addition to face makeup, pierced earrings, rings, cuticles, etc. have also appeared, and hair can be arranged at the beauty salon. Six boys and four girls will appear, and the drama will develop in a fun high school life. Various events such as clubs and school events occur. If you go on a date with your favorite boy ...

The Kisekae series following "Kisekae Monogatari" and "Fashionable Diary". In the game, I go to a ham school to study and challenge a vocational exam. If you pass the desired occupation, you can get clothes suitable for that occupation. There are more than 100,000 combinations of coordination, more than 10 times the previous work! Moreover, boy characters can also be played. You can also strengthen the communication function to make friends' characters appear and enjoy e-mails and bulletin boards. Personality fortune-telling is classified into 64 patterns, so the probability of hitting it may be high!

KLAX - It's simple in concept and easy to play. Catch the colored tiles with the paddle and flip them into bins to make same colored stacks, diagonals and rows of three. Sounds easy? It is. The hard part is pulling yourself away from this fun and addictive game!

KLUSTAR takes TETRIS and twists it around. Rather than moving falling pieces, you must move and rotate a group of pieces that is stuck together. The goal is to get the moving pieces to stick together, forming a solid square of blocks. One that is done, the square disappears and the remaining pieces collapse inward, creating more room to maneuver. If you miss a piece, it will stick to the sides of the play area and cannot be removed. The game ends when the cluster of pieces becomes so big that it cannot fit into the screen. With 16 skill levels, the degree of challenge is always appropriate. If friends want to join the action, they can via a link cable. See how long you can last in KLUSTAR.

title_en: KNIGHTS OF THE ZODIAC - THE PHOENIX RETURNS
no_intro_name: Knights of the Zodiac - The Phoenix Returns
overview_en:
The knights always appear when evil tries to harm the world, the zodiac knights come to the GameBoy Color in this fan made with love for all the fans.

Relive your childhood imagining what it would have been like to have a title like this in your time.

Professional boxing comes to the Game Boy Color with KNOCKOUT KINGS. Choose from 38 professional boxers from all weight classes including Evander Holyfield, Ike Quartey, Lennox Lewis, Michael Moore, Shane Mosley, Oscar De La Hoya, "Sugar" Ray Leonard, and Muhammad Ali. For some quick action, choose any two boxers and enter an Arcade match. Arcade matches are less realistic and can result in quick knockouts. However, you can also choose to play in a simulation Exhibition match, where you must master ring strategies and wear down your opponent. If you are looking for a real challenge, create a boxer and fight through the ranks and become world champion. KNOCKOUT KINGS brings the subtlety of the sweet science to your handheld, without having pay outrageous pay-per-view prices.

Take part in all your favourite winter sports from the palm of your hand with 8 of the most popular events including snowboarding, skiing, speed skating and bobsleigh.

A breeding RPG that raises larvae and creates strong genomic insects. The period for raising larvae is 20 days. The type after becoming an adult changes depending on the type of food and training (mini game). When you become an adult, go on a journey to fight killer insects and level up. Three genomic insects participate in the battle. When you fight and defeat the enemy, it is recorded in the insect picture book. There are 97 types of insects. You can play against your friend's insects using the communication cable.

The second installment of Dr. Insect. The player goes out to collect insects with his companion character. Items can be obtained by clearing a number of waiting events, and all 255 types of insects living in the field will be caught to complete the insect pictorial book. You can raise the caught insects, participate in the competition to win the championship, enjoy the auction, and play freely. You can exchange insects with your friends via communication.

A game that focuses on "the fun of finding and catching insects" by collecting insects that live in mountains and rivers in various ways. Take on the challenge of collecting insects by making full use of various actions such as crouching, dashing, catching hats, and catching directly above! Collected insects can be bred at home or exhibited at fairs. Insects that have been successfully bred will be recorded in the picture book. You can exchange insects with your friends by using a communication cable.

Las Vegas is the gambling capital of the world. Every game in the world has some kind of action in Sin City. Now you can travel to Vegas and try to win some virtual dollars in LAS VEGAS COOL HAND. Play three classic card games: Blackjack, Solitaire, and Cribbage. All of the games have four different variations to play. In Blackjack, the goal is to get as close to 21 as possible without going over, while also beating the dealer's hand. Solitaire has the player trying to place stacks of cards in order and removing the cards one by one. The goal in Cribbage is to be the first person to score 121 points. Take a trip to sin city and try to break the bank in LAS VEGAS COOL HAND.

Take a little trip around the world for grueling, 24-hour race action. Based on the annual racing series that takes place in the south of France, this version will lead you from Toronto to Detroit, to the peaks of Everest. Take your pick from 10 real racing vehicles, like the Nissan R390 and the BMW V12VMR. With more than 10 courses to race on, you'll certainly have your work cut out for you. Along the tour, you'll use oil slicks, engine upgrades, invincibility power-ups, and more to get an edge on the competition. The better you do, the more cars you'll be able to unlock, and thereby improving your chances of taking the cup. There are three different play modes: Le Mans pits you against tough competition in a real Le Mans circuit; Championship takes you through a full season; and Arcade allows you play a single race. The graphics are great, the gameplay is smooth, and there are more options than you could ever ask for. Buckle up and put the pedal to the metal!

no_intro_name: Legend of the River King 2 (USA) (SGB Enhanced) (GB Compatible)
overview_en: Mean-hearted spirits control the River King and Sea King, the biggest fish in the world. Now an angel wants you and your brother to track down the elusive beasts, but your mission is anything but divine. First you'll need to fish for smaller fry to feed yourself and save up for top-notch tackle and rods, provided some animal doesn't make off with your catch of the day first. Legend of the River King 2 is a massive role-playing adventure that features all manner of angling from fresh water fly-fishing to deep sea trolling. A new trade mode allows you to trade your fish for produce with farmers in Harvest Moon GBC2!
publisher:

overview_en: Your sister is ill and you must find the Guardian Fish to save her in LEGEND OF THE RIVER KING. Travel throughout the world and blaze trails to find the best fishing holes. Be careful though, because you might have to fight wild animals with your bare hands. You can catch fish with either bait or lures, each with relative strengths and weaknesses. After catching a small one, keep it stress-free in an aquarium and watch it grow. Hopefully, you will be able to find the Guardian Fish and save your sister in LEGEND OF THE RIVER KING.
